         gjahr TYPE ikpf-gjahr,
         budat TYPE ikpf-budat,
         usnam TYPE ikpf-usnam,
         werks TYPE ikpf-werks,
         lgort TYPE ikpf-lgort,
       END OF ty_ikpf.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_iseg,
         iblnr TYPE iseg-iblnr,
         gjahr TYPE iseg-gjahr,
         zeili TYPE iseg-zeili,
         matnr TYPE iseg-matnr,
         charg TYPE iseg-charg,
         werks TYPE iseg-werks,
         lgort TYPE iseg-lgort,
         sgtxt TYPE iseg-sgtxt,
         mengs TYPE iseg-mengs,
         menge TYPE iseg-menge,
         meins TYPE iseg-meins,
       END OF ty_iseg.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_mard,
         matnr TYPE mard-matnr,
         lgort TYPE mard-lgort,
         labst TYPE mard-labst,
       END OF ty_mard.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_makt,
         matnr TYPE makt-matnr,
         maktx TYPE makt-maktx,
       END OF ty_makt.

DATA: gt_ikpf TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_ikpf,
      gt_iseg TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_iseg,
      gt_mard TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_mard,
      gt_makt TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_makt,
      gs_ikpf TYPE ty_ikpf,
      gs_iseg TYPE ty_iseg,
      gv_iblnr TYPE ikpf-iblnr,
      gv_werks TYPE ikpf-werks,
      gv_lgort TYPE ikpf-lgort.

* Selection screen
SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
  PARAMETERS: p_iblnr TYPE ikpf-iblnr OBLIGATORY,
              p_gjahr TYPE ikpf-gjahr OBLIGATORY DEFAULT sy-datum+0(4),
              p_werks TYPE ikpf-werks OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '1000'.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.

* AT SELECTION-SCREEN
AT SELECTION-SCREEN.
  SELECT SINGLE iblnr gjahr
         INTO (gs_ikpf-iblnr, gs_ikpf-gjahr)
         FROM ikpf
         WHERE iblnr = p_iblnr AND gjahr = p_gjahr AND werks = p_werks.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'Physical inventory document not found!' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

* START-OF-SELECTION
START-OF-SELECTION.

  SELECT iblnr gjahr budat usnam werks lgort
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_ikpf
         FROM ikpf
         WHERE iblnr = p_iblnr AND gjahr = p_gjahr AND werks = p_werks.

  SELECT iblnr gjahr zeili matnr charg werks lgort sgtxt mengs menge meins
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_iseg
         FROM iseg
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_ikpf
         WHERE iblnr = gt_ikpf-iblnr AND gjahr = gt_ikpf-gjahr.

  SELECT matnr lgort labst
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_mard
         FROM mard
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_iseg
         WHERE matnr = gt_iseg-matnr
           AND lgort = gt_iseg-lgort
           AND werks = gt_iseg-werks.

  SELECT matnr maktx
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_makt
         FROM makt
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_iseg
         WHERE matnr = gt_iseg-matnr AND spras = sy-langu.

  SORT gt_iseg BY zeili.
  SORT gt_mard BY matnr lgort.
  SORT gt_makt BY matnr.

* Output inventory count sheet
WRITE: / 'Physical Inventory Count Sheet',
       AT 40 'Document:', gt_ikpf[1]-iblnr, gt_ikpf[1]-gjahr,
       AT 70 'Plant:', gt_ikpf[1]-werks,
       AT 90 'Sloc:', gt_ikpf[1]-lgort,
       AT 105 'Count Date:', gt_ikpf[1]-budat,
       AT 125 'Created By:', gt_ikpf[1]-usnam.
ULINE /(150).

WRITE: /5 'Line', 15 'Material', 40 'Description', 70 'Batch', 90 'Sloc', 100 'Book Qty', 120 'Counted', 135 'UoM'.
ULINE /(150).

LOOP AT gt_iseg INTO gs_iseg.
  DATA(lv_maktx) = VALUE #( gt_makt[ matnr = gs_iseg-matnr ]-maktx OPTIONAL ).
  DATA(lv_book) = VALUE #( gt_mard[ matnr = gs_iseg-matnr lgort = gs_iseg-lgort ]-labst OPTIONAL ).

  WRITE: /5 gs_iseg-zeili,
         15 gs_iseg-matnr,
         40 lv_maktx,
         70 gs_iseg-charg,
         90 gs_iseg-lgort,
         100 lv_book,
         135 gs_iseg-meins.
ENDLOOP.

output.program_summary: This report prepares a physical inventory count sheet for an existing SAP inventory document, showing book quantities and empty fields for manual count entry.
output.logical_flow:
1. Validate inventory document exists on AT SELECTION-SCREEN.
2. Fetch document header from IKPF, line items from ISEG.
3. Retrieve book quantity from MARD, descriptions from MAKT.
4. Output a formatted count sheet with line number, material, description, batch, sloc, book qty, and blank counted qty column.
key_data_structures: GT_IKPF: Standard table of TY_IKPF, stores inventory document header.
GT_ISEG: Standard table of TY_ISEG, stores inventory document line items.
GT_MARD: Standard table of TY_MARD, stores book stock quantities.
output.technical_notes: Uses VALUE #() constructor expressions for safe optional read access to internal tables, avoiding exceptions if entry not found.

input:
REPORT Z_WEBSHOP_ORDER_EXPORT.

* Tables
TABLES: vbak, vbap, kna1, adrc, knvk, mara, makt, t001w.

* Constants
CONSTANTS: gc_sep TYPE c VALUE ';',
           gc_file TYPE string VALUE 'C:\temp\webshop_orders.csv'.

* Data
TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_order_header,
         order_number TYPE string,
         customer_id TYPE string,
         customer_name TYPE string,
         customer_email TYPE string,
         order_date TYPE string,
         total_amount TYPE string,
         currency TYPE string,
       END OF ty_order_header.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_order_line,
         order_number TYPE string,
         line_number TYPE i,
         product_sku TYPE string,
         product_name TYPE string,
         quantity TYPE string,
         unit_price TYPE string,
         line_total TYPE string,
       END OF ty_order_line.

DATA: gt_headers TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_order_header,
      gt_lines TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_order_line,
      gs_header TYPE ty_order_header,
      gs_line TYPE ty_order_line,
      gt_csv TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF string,
      gs_vbak TYPE vbak,
      gs_vbap TYPE vbap,
      gs_kna1 TYPE kna1,
      gs_adrc TYPE adrc,
      gs_kvnk TYPE knvk,
      gv_date TYPE string,
      gv_path TYPE string.

* Selection screen
SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
  PARAMETERS: p_from TYPE datum OBLIGATORY DEFAULT sy-datum - 7,
              p_to TYPE datum OBLIGATORY DEFAULT sy-datum,
              p_file TYPE string OBLIGATORY DEFAULT gc_file LOWER CASE.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: s_vbeln FOR gs_vbak-vbeln NO INTERVALS.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.

* START-OF-SELECTION
START-OF-SELECTION.

* Step 1: Get sales orders
  SELECT vbeln erdat kunnr netwr waers
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_headers
         FROM vbak
         WHERE erdat BETWEEN p_from AND p_to
           AND vbeln IN s_vbeln.

  IF gt_headers IS INITIAL.
    MESSAGE 'No orders found!' TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
    EXIT.
  ENDIF.

* Step 2: Fetch related data
  SELECT *
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_headers
         FROM vbak AS v
         INNER JOIN kna1 AS k ON v~kunnr = k~kunnr
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_headers
         WHERE v~vbeln = gt_headers-order_number.

  SELECT vbeln posnr matnr kwmeng vrkme netpr
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_lines
         FROM vbap
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_headers
         WHERE vbeln = gt_headers-order_number.

* Step 3: Get product names
  SELECT vbap~vbeln vbap~posnr vbap~matnr vbap~kwmeng vbap~vrkme vbap~netpr
         makt~maktx
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_lines
         FROM vbap
         INNER JOIN makt ON vbap~matnr = makt~matnr
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_headers
         WHERE vbap~vbeln = gt_headers-order_number
           AND makt~spras = sy-langu.

* Step 4: Prepare CSV
  CONCATENATE 'OrderNumber' gc_sep 'CustomerID' gc_sep 'CustomerName' gc_sep 'OrderDate'
              gc_sep 'TotalAmount' gc_sep 'Currency'
         INTO DATA(lv_header_line).
  APPEND lv_header_line TO gt_csv.

  LOOP AT gt_headers INTO gs_header.
    CONCATENATE gs_header-order_number gs_header-customer_id
               gs_header-customer_name gs_header-order_date
               gs_header-total_amount gs_header-currency
               INTO DATA(lv_line) SEPARATED BY gc_sep.
    APPEND lv_line TO gt_csv.

    LOOP AT gt_lines INTO gs_line WHERE order_number = gs_header-order_number.
      CONCATENATE 'LINE' gc_sep gs_line-order_number
                 gs_line-line_number gs_line-product_sku
                 gs_line-product_name gs_line-quantity
                 gs_line-unit_price gs_line-line_total
                 INTO lv_line SEPARATED BY gc_sep.
      APPEND lv_line TO gt_csv.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDLOOP.

* Step 5: Download file
  CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      filename                = p_file
      filetype                = 'ASC'
    TABLES
      data_tab                = gt_csv
    EXCEPTIONS
      file_write_error        = 1
      no_batch                = 2
      gui_refuse_filetransfer = 3
      invalid_type            = 4
      no_authority            = 5
      unknown_error           = 6
      header_not_allowed      = 7
      separator_not_allowed   = 8
      filesize_not_allowed    = 9
      header_too_long         = 10
      dp_error_create         = 11
      dp_error_send           = 12
      dp_error_write          = 13
      unknown_dp_error        = 14
      access_denied           = 15
      dp_out_of_memory        = 16
      disk_full               = 17
      dp_timeout              = 18
      file_not_found          = 19
      dataprovider_exception  = 20
      control_flush_error     = 21
      OTHERS                  = 22.

  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    MESSAGE |File downloaded successfully to: { p_file }| TYPE 'S'.
  ELSE.
    MESSAGE |Error downloading file: { p_file }| TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

output.program_summary: This report exports selected sales orders to a CSV file for import into a webshop or external e-commerce system.
output.logical_flow:
1. Retrieve sales order headers from VBAK for date range and order numbers.
2. Join with KNA1 for customer data, and VBAP + MAKT for line items + product names.
3. Construct CSV header row and data rows, separating columns with semicolons.
4. Use GUI_DOWNLOAD function to download the CSV file to local PC.
key_data_structures: GT_HEADERS: Standard table of TY_ORDER_HEADER, stores order header data.
GT_LINES: Standard table of TY_ORDER_LINE, stores order line item data.
GT_CSV: Standard table of STRING, stores final CSV lines for download.
output.technical_notes: Uses GUI_DOWNLOAD standard function module for local file downloads, and CONCATENATE for CSV line construction.

input:
REPORT Z_PRODUCTION_ORDER_MONITOR.

* Tables
TABLES: aufk, afpo, afko, mseg, mkpf, mara, makt.

* Types
TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_aufk,
         aufnr TYPE aufk-aufnr,
         auart TYPE aufk-auart,
         matnr TYPE aufk-matnr,
         gamng TYPE aufk-gamng,
         gmein TYPE aufk-gmein,
         gsmeng TYPE aufk-gsmeng,
         erdat TYPE aufk-erdat,
         ernam TYPE aufk-ernam,
       END OF ty_aufk.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_afpo,
         aufnr TYPE afpo-aufnr,
         posnr TYPE afpo-posnr,
         matnr TYPE afpo-matnr,
         ddmng TYPE afpo-ddmng,
         meins TYPE afpo-meins,
       END OF ty_afpo.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_afko,
         aufnr TYPE afko-aufnr,
         gamng TYPE afko-gamng,
         gstrp TYPE afko-gstrp,
         gltrp TYPE afko-gltrp,
         gsmng TYPE afko-gsmng,
         isdd TYPE afko-isdd,
       END OF ty_afko.

DATA: gt_aufk TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_aufk,
      gt_afpo TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_afpo,
      gt_afko TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_afko,
      gs_aufk TYPE ty_aufk,
      gs_afpo TYPE ty_afpo,
      gs_afko TYPE ty_afko,
      gv_auart TYPE aufk-auart,
      gv_werks TYPE aufk-werks.

* Selection screen
SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
  PARAMETERS: p_werks TYPE aufk-werks OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '1000',
              p_auart TYPE aufk-auart OBLIGATORY DEFAULT 'PP01',
              p_erdat TYPE datum OBLIGATORY DEFAULT sy-datum - 30.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: s_aufnr FOR gs_aufk-aufnr NO INTERVALS.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.

* START-OF-SELECTION
START-OF-SELECTION.

  SELECT aufnr auart matnr gamng gmein gsmeng erdat ernam
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_aufk
         FROM aufk
         WHERE werks = p_werks
           AND auart = p_auart
           AND erdat >= p_erdat
           AND aufnr IN s_aufnr.

  IF gt_aufk IS INITIAL.
    MESSAGE 'No production orders found!' TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
    EXIT.
  ENDIF.

  SELECT aufnr posnr matnr ddmng meins
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_afpo
         FROM afpo
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_aufk
         WHERE aufnr = gt_aufk-aufnr.

  SELECT aufnr gamng gstrp gltrp gsmng isdd
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_afko
         FROM afko
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_aufk
         WHERE aufnr = gt_aufk-aufnr.

  SORT gt_aufk BY aufnr.
  SORT gt_afpo BY aufnr posnr.
  SORT gt_afko BY aufnr.

* Output
FORMAT COLOR COL_HEADING.
WRITE: / 'Production Order Monitor',
       AT 40 'Plant:', p_werks,
       AT 60 'Order Type:', p_auart,
       AT 85 'Since:', p_erdat.
FORMAT COLOR OFF.
ULINE /(150).

LOOP AT gt_aufk INTO gs_aufk.
  READ TABLE gt_afko INTO gs_afko WITH KEY aufnr = gs_aufk-aufnr BINARY SEARCH.

  DATA(lv_status) = COND #(
    WHEN gs_afko-isdd IS NOT INITIAL THEN 'Delivered'
    WHEN gs_aufk-gsmeng > 0 AND gs_aufk-gsmeng < gs_aufk-gamng THEN 'Partially Delivered'
    WHEN gs_afko-gstrp > sy-datum THEN 'Scheduled'
    WHEN gs_aufk-gsmeng = gs_aufk-gamng THEN 'Completed'
    ELSE 'In Process' ).

  WRITE: / 'Order:', gs_aufk-aufnr,
         / 'Order Type:', gs_aufk-auart,
         / 'Material:', gs_aufk-matnr,
         / 'Planned Qty:', gs_aufk-gamng, gs_aufk-gmein,
         / 'Delivered Qty:', gs_aufk-gsmeng, gs_aufk-gmein,
         / 'Status:', lv_status,
         / 'Start:', gs_afko-gstrp, 'Finish:', gs_afko-gltrp.

  ULINE.
  WRITE: / 'Order Items:', /.
  WRITE: /5 'Item', 20 'Material', 50 'Qty', 70 'UoM'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT gt_afpo INTO gs_afpo WHERE aufnr = gs_aufk-aufnr.
    WRITE: /5 gs_afpo-posnr,
           20 gs_afpo-matnr,
           50 gs_afpo-ddmng,
           70 gs_afpo-meins.
  ENDLOOP.

  ULINE /(150).
ENDLOOP.

output.program_summary: This report monitors production orders (from AUFK, AFPO, AFKO) showing status, quantities, and timeline for a given plant and order type.
output.logical_flow:
1. Select production orders from AUFK for plant, order type, and creation date range.
2. Get order items from AFPO and header scheduling data from AFKO.
3. Determine order status using conditional logic (COND #() constructor expression).
4. Display header info and line items per order.
key_data_structures: GT_AUFK: Standard table of TY_AUFK, stores production order header data.
GT_AFPO: Standard table of TY_AFPO, stores production order items.
GT_AFKO: Standard table of TY_AFKO, stores production order scheduling data.
output.technical_notes: Uses ABAP constructor expression COND #() to dynamically determine order status without nested IF/ELSE statements.

input:
REPORT Z_EMPLOYEE_EXPENSE_REPORT.

* Tables
TABLES: pa0001, pa0002, pa0008, pa0014, pcl1, t511, t511t.

* Constants
CONSTANTS: gc_tclas TYPE tclas VALUE 'A',
           gc_relid TYPE relid VALUE 'TX'.

* Types
TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_pa0001,
         pernr TYPE pa0001-pernr,
         bukrs TYPE pa0001-bukrs,
         werks TYPE pa0001-werks,
         persg TYPE pa0001-persg,
         persk TYPE pa0001-persk,
         plans TYPE pa0001-plans,
         begda TYPE pa0001-begda,
         endda TYPE pa0001-endda,
       END OF ty_pa0001.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_pa0002,
         pernr TYPE pa0002-pernr,
         vorna TYPE pa0002-vorna,
         nachn TYPE pa0002-nachn,
         gbdat TYPE pa0002-gbdat,
         gesch TYPE pa0002-gesch,
       END OF ty_pa0002.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_pa0014,
         pernr TYPE pa0014-pernr,
         subty TYPE pa0014-subty,
         objps TYPE pa0014-objps,
         endda TYPE pa0014-endda,
         begda TYPE pa0014-begda,
         lgart TYPE pa0014-lgart,
         betrg TYPE pa0014-betrg,
         waers TYPE pa0014-waers,
       END OF ty_pa0014.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_t511t,
         lgart TYPE t511t-lgart,
         lgtxt TYPE t511t-lgtxt,
       END OF ty_t511t.

DATA: gt_pa0001 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_pa0001,
      gt_pa0002 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_pa0002,
      gt_pa0014 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_pa0014,
      gt_t511t TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_t511t,
      gs_pa0001 TYPE ty_pa0001,
      gs_pa0002 TYPE ty_pa0002,
      gs_pa0014 TYPE ty_pa0014,
      gv_pernr TYPE pernr_d,
      gv_waers TYPE waers.

* Selection screen
SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
  PARAMETERS: p_pernr TYPE pa0001-pernr MATCHCODE OBJECT PREM,
              p_werks TYPE pa0001-werks OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '1000',
              p_begda TYPE datum OBLIGATORY DEFAULT sy-datum - 90,
              p_endda TYPE datum OBLIGATORY DEFAULT sy-datum.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: s_pernr FOR p_pernr NO INTERVALS.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.

* START-OF-SELECTION
START-OF-SELECTION.

  SELECT pernr bukrs werks persg persk plans begda endda
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_pa0001
         FROM pa0001
         WHERE werks = p_werks
           AND pernr IN s_pernr
           AND endda >= p_begda
           AND begda <= p_endda.

  IF gt_pa0001 IS INITIAL.
    MESSAGE 'No employees found!' TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
    EXIT.
  ENDIF.

  SELECT pernr vorna nachn gbdat gesch
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_pa0002
         FROM pa0002
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_pa0001
         WHERE pernr = gt_pa0001-pernr.

  SELECT pernr subty objps endda begda lgart betrg waers
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_pa0014
         FROM pa0014
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_pa0001
         WHERE pernr = gt_pa0001-pernr
           AND endda >= p_begda
           AND begda <= p_endda.

  SELECT lgart lgtxt
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_t511t
         FROM t511t
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_pa0014
         WHERE lgart = gt_pa0014-lgart
           AND sprsl = sy-langu.

  SORT gt_pa0001 BY pernr begda DESCENDING.
  SORT gt_pa0002 BY pernr.
  SORT gt_pa0014 BY pernr lgart begda.
  SORT gt_t511t BY lgart.

* Output
FORMAT COLOR COL_HEADING.
WRITE: / 'Employee Expense Report',
       AT 40 'Period:', p_begda, 'to', p_endda,
       AT 70 'Plant:', p_werks.
FORMAT COLOR OFF.
ULINE /(140).

LOOP AT gt_pa0001 INTO gs_pa0001.
  AT NEW pernr.
    READ TABLE gt_pa0002 INTO gs_pa0002 WITH KEY pernr = gs_pa0001-pernr BINARY SEARCH.
    WRITE: / 'Employee:', gs_pa0001-pernr,
           / 'Name:', gs_pa0002-vorna, gs_pa0002-nachn,
           / 'Company Code:', gs_pa0001-bukrs,
           / 'Employee Group:', gs_pa0001-persg,
           / 'Employee Subgroup:', gs_pa0001-persk.
    ULINE.
    WRITE: /5 'Wage Type', 30 'Description', 55 'Start Date', 75 'End Date',
           95 'Amount', 115 'Currency'.
    ULINE.
  ENDAT.

  READ TABLE gt_t511t INTO DATA(ls_t511t) WITH KEY lgart = gs_pa0014-lgart BINARY SEARCH.
  LOOP AT gt_pa0014 INTO gs_pa0014 WHERE pernr = gs_pa0001-pernr.
    WRITE: /5 gs_pa0014-lgart,
           30 ls_t511t-lgtxt,
           55 gs_pa0014-begda,
           75 gs_pa0014-endda,
           95 gs_pa0014-betrg,
           115 gs_pa0014-waers.
  ENDLOOP.

  AT END OF pernr.
    DATA(lv_total) = REDUCE #( INIT total = 0
                               FOR <line> IN gt_pa0014
                               WHERE <line>-pernr = gs_pa0001-pernr
                               NEXT total = total + <line>-betrg ).
    WRITE: / 'Total Expenses for Period:', lv_total CURRENCY 'EUR'.
    ULINE /(140).
  ENDAT.
ENDLOOP.

output.program_summary: This HR report shows employee expense wage types from IT0014 for a given period, with employee master data and totals.
output.logical_flow:
1. Select active employees from PA0001 (IT0001) for plant and date range.
2. Get personal data from PA0002 (IT0002) and expense wage types from PA0014 (IT0014).
3. Fetch wage type descriptions from T511T.
4. Use AT NEW/AT END control breaks to group by employee and show totals.
5. Use REDUCE constructor expression to calculate per-employee expense totals.
key_data_structures: GT_PA0001: Standard table of TY_PA0001, stores employee organizational assignment (IT0001).
GT_PA0002: Standard table of TY_PA0002, stores employee personal data (IT0002).
GT_PA0014: Standard table of TY_PA0014, stores employee recurring payments/deductions (IT0014).
output.technical_notes: Uses REDUCE operator for declarative total calculation, and control level statements (AT NEW/AT END) for grouping.

input:
REPORT Z_BATCH_WHERE_USED_LIST.

* Tables
TABLES: mchb, mseg, mkpf, marc, makt, afpo, aufk, resb, stko, stpo.

* Types
TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_mchb,
         matnr TYPE mchb-matnr,
         charg TYPE mchb-charg,
         werks TYPE mchb-werks,
         lgort TYPE mchb-lgort,
         clabs TYPE mchb-clabs,
       END OF ty_mchb.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_mseg,
         mblnr TYPE mseg-mblnr,
         mjahr TYPE mseg-mjahr,
         zeile TYPE mseg-zeile,
         mbewart TYPE mseg-bwart,
         matnr TYPE mseg-matnr,
         charg TYPE mseg-charg,
         werks TYPE mseg-werks,
         lgort TYPE mseg-lgort,
         menge TYPE mseg-menge,
         meins TYPE mseg-meins,
         aufnr TYPE mseg-aufnr,
         bwart TYPE mseg-bwart,
       END OF ty_mseg.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_mkpf,
         mblnr TYPE mkpf-mblnr,
         mjahr TYPE mkpf-mjahr,
         budat TYPE mkpf-budat,
         usnam TYPE mkpf-usnam,
       END OF ty_mkpf.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_aufk,
         aufnr TYPE aufk-aufnr,
         auart TYPE aufk-auart,
         matnr TYPE aufk-matnr,
         gamng TYPE aufk-gamng,
       END OF ty_aufk.

DATA: gt_mchb TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_mchb,
      gt_mseg TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_mseg,
      gt_mkpf TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_mkpf,
      gt_aufk TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_aufk,
      gt_makt TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF makt,
      gs_mchb TYPE ty_mchb,
      gs_mseg TYPE ty_mseg,
      gv_matnr TYPE mara-matnr,
      gv_charg TYPE charg_d,
      gv_werks TYPE werks_d.

* Selection screen
SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
  PARAMETERS: p_matnr TYPE mara-matnr OBLIGATORY MATCHCODE OBJECT MAT1,
              p_charg TYPE charg_d,
              p_werks TYPE werks_d OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '1000'.
  SELECT-OPTIONS: s_charg FOR p_charg NO INTERVALS.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.

* START-OF-SELECTION
START-OF-SELECTION.

  SELECT matnr charg werks lgort clabs
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_mchb
         FROM mchb
         WHERE matnr = p_matnr
           AND werks = p_werks
           AND charg IN s_charg.

  IF gt_mchb IS INITIAL.
    MESSAGE 'No batches found for this material!' TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.
    EXIT.
  ENDIF.

  SELECT m~mblnr m~mjahr m~zeile m~bwart m~matnr m~charg
         m~werks m~lgort m~menge m~meins m~aufnr
         k~budat k~usnam
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_mseg
         FROM mseg AS m
         INNER JOIN mkpf AS k ON m~mblnr = k~mblnr AND m~mjahr = k~mjahr
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_mchb
         WHERE m~matnr = gt_mchb-matnr
           AND m~charg = gt_mchb-charg
           AND m~werks = gt_mchb-werks.

  SELECT aufnr auart matnr gamng
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_aufk
         FROM aufk
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_mseg
         WHERE aufnr = gt_mseg-aufnr AND aufnr IS NOT INITIAL.

  SELECT matnr maktx
         INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE gt_makt
         FROM makt
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN gt_mchb
         WHERE matnr = gt_mchb-matnr AND spras = sy-langu.

  SORT gt_mseg BY mblnr mjahr zeile.
  SORT gt_mkpf BY mblnr mjahr.
  SORT gt_aufk BY aufnr.
  SORT gt_makt BY matnr.

* Output
DATA(lv_mat_desc) = gt_makt[ 1 ]-maktx.
WRITE: / 'Batch Where-Used Report',
       AT 40 'Material:', p_matnr, lv_mat_desc,
       AT 90 'Plant:', p_werks,
       AT 110 'Date:', sy-datum.
ULINE /(140).

LOOP AT gt_mchb INTO gs_mchb.
  WRITE: / 'Batch:', gs_mchb-charg,
         / 'Current Stock:', gs_mchb-clabs,
         / 'Storage Location:', gs_mchb-lgort.
  ULINE.
  WRITE: /5 'Doc No', 20 'Year', 30 'Date', 50 'User', 65 'MvT',
           80 'Qty', 100 'UoM', 115 'PO/Prod Ord'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT gt_mseg INTO gs_mseg WHERE matnr = gs_mchb-matnr
                                     AND charg = gs_mchb-charg
                                     AND werks = gs_mchb-werks.
    DATA(lv_aufnr_text) = COND #(
      WHEN gs_mseg-aufnr IS NOT INITIAL THEN |Prod Ord: { gs_mseg-aufnr }|
      ELSE '' ).

    WRITE: /5 gs_mseg-mblnr,
           20 gs_mseg-mjahr,
           30 gs_mseg-budat,
           50 gs_mseg-usnam,
           65 gs_mseg-bwart,
           80 gs_mseg-menge,
           100 gs_mseg-meins,
           115 lv_aufnr_text.
  ENDLOOP.

  ULINE /(140).
ENDLOOP.

output.program_summary: This batch where-used report shows all goods movements for selected material batches, including links to production orders, and displays current stock.
output.logical_flow:
1. Select current batch stock from MCHB for material, plant, and batches.
2. Get goods movements from MSEG + MKPF (material documents) for those batches.
3. Get production orders from AUFK for movements referencing orders.
4. Display current batch stock first, then all goods movements with transaction type, quantity, and date/user.
key_data_structures: GT_MCHB: Standard table of TY_MCHB, stores batch stock data (MCHB).
GT_MSEG: Standard table of TY_MSEG, stores material document line items (MSEG).
GT_MKPF: Standard table of TY_MKPF, stores material document headers (MKPF).
output.technical_notes: Filters goods movements specifically for the selected batches, and links to production orders via AUFNR field in MSEG.

input:
REPORT Z_ASSET_DEPRECIATION_FORECAST.

TABLES: ANLA, ANLB, ANLC, ANLH, T093, T093C, T001.

DATA: BEGIN OF ASSET_STRUCTURE,
        BUKRS LIKE ANLA-BUKRS,
        ANLN1 LIKE ANLA-ANLN1,
        ANLN2 LIKE ANLA-ANLN2,
        TXT50 LIKE ANLA-TXT50,
        ANLKL LIKE ANLA-ANLKL,
        AKTIV LIKE ANLA-AKTIV,
        LIFNR LIKE ANLA-LIFNR,
        KOSTL LIKE ANLA-KOSTL,
        GJAHR LIKE ANLA-GJAHR,
        ACQUISITION_DATE LIKE ANLA-AKTIV,
        ACQUISITION_COST TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        ACCUMULATED_DEPRECIATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        NET_BOOK_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        USEFUL_LIFE_YEARS TYPE I,
        CURRENT_YEAR_DEPRECIATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        NEXT_YEAR_DEPRECIATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        SECOND_YEAR_DEPRECIATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        THIRD_YEAR_DEPRECIATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        DEPRECIATION_METHOD TYPE CHAR10,
        REMINING_USEFUL_LIFE TYPE I,
        DEPRECIATION_END_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      END OF ASSET_STRUCTURE.

DATA: ASSET_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ASSET_STRUCTURE,
      WA_ASSET LIKE ASSET_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF DEPRECIATION_FORECAST_STRUCTURE,
        FISCAL_YEAR TYPE GJAHR,
        PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        PROJECTED_ASSET_COUNT TYPE I,
        FULLY_DEPRECIATED_COUNT TYPE I,
        CUMULATIVE_DEPRECIATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF DEPRECIATION_FORECAST_STRUCTURE.

DATA: FORECAST_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF DEPRECIATION_FORECAST_STRUCTURE,
      WA_FORECAST LIKE DEPRECIATION_FORECAST_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF ASSET_CLASS_SUMMARY,
        ANLKL LIKE ANLA-ANLKL,
        ANLKTX LIKE T093-TXT50,
        ASSET_COUNT TYPE I,
        TOTAL_ACQUISITION_COST TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_NET_BOOK_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_CURRENT_DEPRECIATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        AVG_USEFUL_LIFE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF ASSET_CLASS_SUMMARY.

DATA: CLASS_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ASSET_CLASS_SUMMARY,
      WA_CLASS LIKE ASSET_CLASS_SUMMARY.

DATA: LV_CURRENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_CURRENT_FISCAL_YEAR TYPE GJAHR,
      LV_TOTAL_ASSETS TYPE I,
      LV_TOTAL_NBV TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_TOTAL_ACQUISITION_COST TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_TOTAL_ANNUAL_DEPRECIATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_FORECAST_HORIZON TYPE I VALUE 5,
      LV_COMPANY_NAME TYPE T001-BUTXT.

SELECT-OPTIONS: S_BUKRS FOR ANLA-BUKRS DEFAULT '1000',
                S_ANLN1 FOR ANLA-ANLN1,
                S_ANLKL FOR ANLA-ANLKL,
                S_GJAHR FOR ANLA-GJAHR DEFAULT SY-DATUM+0(4),
                S_KOSTL FOR ANLA-KOSTL.

PARAMETERS: P_BALANCE RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA DEFAULT 'X',
            P_ACTIVE RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_FULLY_DEP RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_FORECAST_YEARS TYPE I DEFAULT 5,
            P_DETAILED AS CHECKBOX,
            P_EXPORT AS CHECKBOX.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  LV_CURRENT_DATE = SY-DATUM.
  LV_CURRENT_FISCAL_YEAR = SY-DATUM+0(4).
  LV_FORECAST_HORIZON = P_FORECAST_YEARS.

  PERFORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  PERFORM FETCH_ASSET_MASTER_DATA.
  PERFORM FETCH_DEPRECIATION_DATA.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_DEPRECIATION_FORECAST.
  PERFORM PERFORM_CLASS_ANALYSIS.
  PERFORM GENERATE_REPORT.

TOP-OF-PAGE.
  WRITE: / 'Asset Depreciation Forecast Report',
         / 'Company:', LV_COMPANY_NAME,
         / 'Fiscal Year:', LV_CURRENT_FISCAL_YEAR,
         / 'Forecast Horizon:', LV_FORECAST_HORIZON, 'Years',
         / 'Generated:', SY-DATUM, 'Time:', SY-UZEIT.
  ULINE.

FORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  SELECT SINGLE BUTXT FROM T001 INTO LV_COMPANY_NAME
    WHERE BUKRS = S_BUKRS-LOW.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_ASSET_MASTER_DATA.
  SELECT BUKRS ANLN1 ANLN2 TXT50 ANLKL AKTIV LIFNR KOSTL GJAHR
    FROM ANLA
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE ASSET_TAB
    WHERE BUKRS IN S_BUKRS
      AND ANLN1 IN S_ANLN1
      AND ANLKL IN S_ANLKL
      AND GJAHR IN S_GJAHR
      AND KOSTL IN S_KOSTL
      AND LOEKZ = ''.

  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'No assets found for the selection' TYPE 'W'.
    STOP.
  ENDIF.

  LOOP AT ASSET_TAB INTO WA_ASSET.
    SELECT SINGLE TXT50 FROM T093 INTO WA_ASSET-DEPRECIATION_METHOD
      WHERE ANLKL = WA_ASSET-ANLKL.
    MODIFY ASSET_TAB FROM WA_ASSET.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_DEPRECIATION_DATA.
  LOOP AT ASSET_TAB INTO WA_ASSET.
    SELECT SINGLE ANSWZ ANSWL
      FROM ANLB
      INTO @DATA(WA_ANLB)
      WHERE BUKRS = WA_ASSET-BUKRS
        AND ANLN1 = WA_ASSET-ANLN1
        AND ANLN2 = WA_ASSET-ANLN2
        AND AFABE = '01'.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_ASSET-USEFUL_LIFE_YEARS = WA_ANLB-ANSWL.
      WA_ASSET-ACQUISITION_DATE = WA_ANLB-ANSWZ.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT SINGLE KANSW
      FROM ANLC
      INTO @DATA(WA_ANLC_ACQUISITION)
      WHERE BUKRS = WA_ASSET-BUKRS
        AND ANLN1 = WA_ASSET-ANLN1
        AND ANLN2 = WA_ASSET-ANLN2
        AND GJAHR = WA_ASSET-GJAHR
        AND AFABE = '01'.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_ASSET-ACQUISITION_COST = WA_ANLC_ACQUISITION.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT SINGLE KANSW
      FROM ANLC
      INTO @DATA(WA_ANLC_NBV)
      WHERE BUKRS = WA_ASSET-BUKRS
        AND ANLN1 = WA_ASSET-ANLN1
        AND ANLN2 = WA_ASSET-ANLN2
        AND GJAHR = LV_CURRENT_FISCAL_YEAR
        AND AFABE = '01'.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_ASSET-NET_BOOK_VALUE = WA_ANLC_NBV.
      WA_ASSET-ACCUMULATED_DEPRECIATION = WA_ASSET-ACQUISITION_COST - WA_ANLC_NBV.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY ASSET_TAB FROM WA_ASSET.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_DEPRECIATION_FORECAST.
  DATA: LV_STRAIGHT_LINE_DEP TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        LV_REMAINING_YEARS TYPE I,
        LV_DEP_YEAR TYPE I.

  LOOP AT ASSET_TAB INTO WA_ASSET.
    IF WA_ASSET-USEFUL_LIFE_YEARS > 0 AND WA_ASSET-ACQUISITION_COST > 0.
      LV_STRAIGHT_LINE_DEP = WA_ASSET-ACQUISITION_COST / WA_ASSET-USEFUL_LIFE_YEARS.
      
      LV_REMAINING_YEARS = WA_ASSET-USEFUL_LIFE_YEARS - 
                           ( LV_CURRENT_FISCAL_YEAR - WA_ASSET-GJAHR ).
      
      WA_ASSET-REMING_USEFUL_LIFE = LV_REMAINING_YEARS.
      
      IF LV_REMAINING_YEARS > 0.
        WA_ASSET-CURRENT_YEAR_DEPRECIATION = LV_STRAIGHT_LINE_DEP.
        
        IF LV_REMAINING_YEARS > 1.
          WA_ASSET-NEXT_YEAR_DEPRECIATION = LV_STRAIGHT_LINE_DEP.
        ELSE.
          WA_ASSET-NEXT_YEAR_DEPRECIATION = WA_ASSET-NET_BOOK_VALUE.
        ENDIF.
        
        IF LV_REMAINING_YEARS > 2.
          WA_ASSET-SECOND_YEAR_DEPRECIATION = LV_STRAIGHT_LINE_DEP.
        ELSE.
          WA_ASSET-SECOND_YEAR_DEPRECIATION = 0.
        ENDIF.
        
        IF LV_REMAINING_YEARS > 3.
          WA_ASSET-THIRD_YEAR_DEPRECIATION = LV_STRAIGHT_LINE_DEP.
        ELSE.
          WA_ASSET-THIRD_YEAR_DEPRECIATION = 0.
        ENDIF.
        
        WA_ASSET-DEPRECIATION_END_DATE = WA_ASSET-GJAHR + WA_ASSET-USEFUL_LIFE_YEARS.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
    
    MODIFY ASSET_TAB FROM WA_ASSET.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM PERFORM_CLASS_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT ASSET_TAB INTO WA_ASSET.
    WA_CLASS-ANLKL = WA_ASSET-ANLKL.
    WA_CLASS-ASSET_COUNT = WA_CLASS-ASSET_COUNT + 1.
    WA_CLASS-TOTAL_ACQUISITION_COST = WA_CLASS-TOTAL_ACQUISITION_COST + WA_ASSET-ACQUISITION_COST.
    WA_CLASS-TOTAL_NET_BOOK_VALUE = WA_CLASS-TOTAL_NET_BOOK_VALUE + WA_ASSET-NET_BOOK_VALUE.
    WA_CLASS-TOTAL_CURRENT_DEPRECIATION = WA_CLASS-TOTAL_CURRENT_DEPRECIATION + WA_ASSET-CURRENT_YEAR_DEPRECIATION.
    
    IF WA_ASSET-USEFUL_LIFE_YEARS > 0.
      WA_CLASS-AVG_USEFUL_LIFE = WA_CLASS-AVG_USEFUL_LIFE + WA_ASSET-USEFUL_LIFE_YEARS.
    ENDIF.
    
    COLLECT WA_CLASS INTO CLASS_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_CLASS.
  ENDLOOP.
  
  LOOP AT CLASS_TAB INTO WA_CLASS.
    IF WA_CLASS-ASSET_COUNT > 0.
      WA_CLASS-AVG_USEFUL_LIFE = WA_CLASS-AVG_USEFUL_LIFE / WA_CLASS-ASSET_COUNT.
      MODIFY CLASS_TAB FROM WA_CLASS.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM GENERATE_REPORT.
  PERFORM DISPLAY_ASSET_OVERVIEW.
  SKIP 2.
  PERFORM DISPLAY_DEPRECIATION_FORECAST.
  SKIP 2.
  PERFORM DISPLAY_ASSET_CLASS_ANALYSIS.
  
  IF P_DETAILED = 'X'.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_DETAILED_ASSET_LIST.
  ENDIF.
  
  IF P_EXPORT = 'X'.
    PERFORM EXPORT_TO_EXCEL.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_ASSET_OVERVIEW.
  LV_TOTAL_ASSETS = LINES( ASSET_TAB ).
  
  LOOP AT ASSET_TAB INTO WA_ASSET.
    LV_TOTAL_ACQUISITION_COST = LV_TOTAL_ACQUISITION_COST + WA_ASSET-ACQUISITION_COST.
    LV_TOTAL_NBV = LV_TOTAL_NBV + WA_ASSET-NET_BOOK_VALUE.
    LV_TOTAL_ANNUAL_DEPRECIATION = LV_TOTAL_ANNUAL_DEPRECIATION + WA_ASSET-CURRENT_YEAR_DEPRECIATION.
  ENDLOOP.
  
  WRITE: / '=== Asset Portfolio Overview ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Total Assets:', LV_TOTAL_ASSETS,
         'Total Acquisition Cost:', LV_TOTAL_ACQUISITION_COST CURRENCY 'USD',
         'Total Net Book Value:', LV_TOTAL_NBV CURRENCY 'USD',
         'Total Annual Depreciation:', LV_TOTAL_ANNUAL_DEPRECIATION CURRENCY 'USD'.
  ULINE.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_DEPRECIATION_FORECAST.
  DATA: LV_FORECAST_YEAR TYPE GJAHR,
        LV_ACCUM_DEP TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        LV_COUNTER TYPE I.
  
  WRITE: / '=== Depreciation Forecast ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Fiscal Year', 'Projected Depreciation', 'Asset Count', 'Fully Depreciated', 'Cumulative Dep'.
  ULINE.
  
  DO LV_FORECAST_HORIZON TIMES.
    LV_FORECAST_YEAR = LV_CURRENT_FISCAL_YEAR + SY-INDEX.
    WA_FORECAST-FISCAL_YEAR = LV_FORECAST_YEAR.
    WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_ASSET_COUNT = 0.
    WA_FORECAST-FULLY_DEPRECIATED_COUNT = 0.
    WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION = 0.
    
    LOOP AT ASSET_TAB INTO WA_ASSET.
      IF WA_ASSET-REMING_USEFUL_LIFE > 0 AND WA_ASSET-NET_BOOK_VALUE > 0.
        IF SY-INDEX = 1.
          WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION = WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION + WA_ASSET-CURRENT_YEAR_DEPRECIATION.
        ELSEIF SY-INDEX = 2.
          WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION = WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION + WA_ASSET-NEXT_YEAR_DEPRECIATION.
        ELSEIF SY-INDEX = 3.
          WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION = WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION + WA_ASSET-SECOND_YEAR_DEPRECIATION.
        ELSEIF SY-INDEX = 4.
          WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION = WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION + WA_ASSET-THIRD_YEAR_DEPRECIATION.
        ENDIF.
        
        WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_ASSET_COUNT = WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_ASSET_COUNT + 1.
        
        IF WA_ASSET-REMING_USEFUL_LIFE <= 0.
          WA_FORECAST-FULLY_DEPRECIATED_COUNT = WA_FORECAST-FULLY_DEPRECIATED_COUNT + 1.
        ENDIF.
      ELSE.
        WA_FORECAST-FULLY_DEPRECIATED_COUNT = WA_FORECAST-FULLY_DEPRECIATED_COUNT + 1.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
    
    LV_ACCUM_DEP = LV_ACCUM_DEP + WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION.
    WA_FORECAST-CUMULATIVE_DEPRECIATION = LV_ACCUM_DEP.
    
    APPEND WA_FORECAST TO FORECAST_TAB.
  ENDDO.
  
  LOOP AT FORECAST_TAB INTO WA_FORECAST.
    WRITE: / WA_FORECAST-FISCAL_YEAR,
             WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_DEPRECIATION CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_FORECAST-PROJECTED_ASSET_COUNT,
             WA_FORECAST-FULLY_DEPRECIATED_COUNT,
             WA_FORECAST-CUMULATIVE_DEPRECIATION CURRENCY 'USD'.
  ENDLOOP.
  ULINE.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_ASSET_CLASS_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Asset Class Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Class', 'Description', 'Count', 'Acquisition Cost',
           'Net Book Value', 'Annual Dep', 'Avg Life (Years)'.
  ULINE.
  
  LOOP AT CLASS_TAB INTO WA_CLASS.
    WRITE: / WA_CLASS-ANLKL, WA_CLASS-ANLKTX(15),
             WA_CLASS-ASSET_COUNT,
             WA_CLASS-TOTAL_ACQUISITION_COST CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_CLASS-TOTAL_NET_BOOK_VALUE CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_CLASS-TOTAL_CURRENT_DEPRECIATION CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_CLASS-AVG_USEFUL_LIFE.
  ENDLOOP.
  ULINE.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_DETAILED_ASSET_LIST.
  WRITE: / '=== Detailed Asset List ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Asset No', 'Description', 'Class', 'Acq Cost',
           'NBV', 'Current Dep', 'End Date', 'Useful Life'.
  ULINE.
  
  LOOP AT ASSET_TAB INTO WA_ASSET.
    WRITE: / WA_ASSET-ANLN1, WA_ASSET-TXT50(15),
             WA_ASSET-ANLKL,
             WA_ASSET-ACQUISITION_COST CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_ASSET-NET_BOOK_VALUE CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_ASSET-CURRENT_YEAR_DEPRECIATION CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_ASSET-DEPRECIATION_END_DATE,
             WA_ASSET-REMING_USEFUL_LIFE.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM EXPORT_TO_EXCEL.
  DATA: LV_FILENAME TYPE STRING.
  
  LV_FILENAME = 'ASSET_FORECAST_' && SY-DATUM && '.xlsx'.
  
  CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      FILENAME = LV_FILENAME
      FILETYPE = 'DAT'
    TABLES
      DATA_TAB = ASSET_TAB
    EXCEPTIONS
      OTHERS = 1.
  
  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    MESSAGE 'Asset data exported successfully' TYPE 'S'.
  ELSE.
    MESSAGE 'Export failed' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

AT LINE-SELECTION.
  PERFORM DRILLDOWN_ASSET_DETAILS.

FORM DRILLDOWN_ASSET_DETAILS.
  READ TABLE ASSET_TAB INTO WA_ASSET INDEX SY-LISEL.
  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    SET PARAMETER ID 'AN1' FIELD WA_ASSET-ANLN1.
    SET PARAMETER ID 'AN2' FIELD WA_ASSET-ANLN2.
    CALL TRANSACTION 'AS03' AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

output.program_summary: This asset depreciation forecast report provides comprehensive analysis and forecasting of asset depreciation over multiple fiscal years. It is designed for fixed asset accountants and financial planners to project future depreciation expenses and asset valuations.
output.logical_flow:
1. User selects company code, asset numbers, asset classes, acquisition years, and cost centers.
2. Asset master data is fetched from ANLA table.
3. Depreciation parameters (start date and useful life) are retrieved from ANLB.
4. Acquisition cost and net book value are fetched from ANLC for the current fiscal year.
5. Straight-line depreciation is calculated based on acquisition cost divided by useful life.
6. Remaining useful life is calculated based on acquisition year and current fiscal year.
7. Depreciation forecast is projected for the next N years (configurable).
8. Asset class analysis aggregates data by asset class with average useful life.
9. Users can view portfolio overview, depreciation forecast table, class analysis, and detailed asset list.
10. Double-click navigates to transaction AS03 for asset master display.
key_data_structures: ASSET_STRUCTURE: Comprehensive asset master data with depreciation calculations and forecast fields.
ASSET_TAB: Main internal table storing all asset data with computed depreciation metrics.
DEPRECIATION_FORECAST_STRUCTURE: Yearly forecast structure with projected depreciation and asset counts.
FORECAST_TAB: Internal table for multi-year depreciation forecast.
ASSET_CLASS_SUMMARY: Aggregated asset class data with totals and averages.
CLASS_TAB: Internal table for asset class analysis.
output.technical_notes: The program uses straight-line depreciation method as default. Useful life is determined from ANLB table. The forecast logic handles assets that will be fully depreciated within the forecast horizon by adjusting the final year depreciation to the remaining net book value. The COLLECT statement aggregates data by asset class with multiple statistical calculations.

input:
REPORT Z_QUALITY_INSPECTION_DASHBOARD.

TABLES: QALS, QAMV, QAVE, QATB, QPCT, QMEL, QMUR, T001.

DATA: BEGIN OF INSPECTION_STRUCTURE,
        PRUEFLOS LIKE QALS-PRUEFLOS,
        MATNR LIKE QALS-MATNR,
        WERKS LIKE QALS-WERKS,
        PRUEFART LIKE QALS-PRUEFART,
        PRUEFGRP LIKE QALS-PRUEFGRP,
        PRSTUFE LIKE QALS-PRSTUFE,
        LOSMENGE LIKE QALS-LOSMENGE,
        ENTNAHME LIKE QALS-ENTNAHME,
        BESTEHTEXT LIKE QALS-BESTEHTEXT,
        ENSTEHDAT LIKE QALS-ENSTEHDAT,
        AUFNR LIKE QALS-AUFNR,
        PLNAL LIKE QALS-PLNAL,
        PLNTY LIKE QALS-PLNTY,
        VORNR LIKE QALS-VORNR,
        STAT02 LIKE QALS-STAT02,
        STAT03 LIKE QALS-STAT03,
        STAT04 LIKE QALS-STAT04,
        STAT05 LIKE QALS-STAT05,
        STAT06 LIKE QALS-STAT06,
        STAT07 LIKE QALS-STAT07,
        STAT08 LIKE QALS-STAT08,
        STAT09 LIKE QALS-STAT09,
        STAT10 LIKE QALS-STAT10,
        INSPECTION_RESULT TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        RESULT_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        SKIP_QTY TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        REJECT_QTY TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        PASS_QTY TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        ACCEPTANCE_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_DEFECTS TYPE I,
        SEVERITY_SCORE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        INSPECTION_DURATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF INSPECTION_STRUCTURE.

DATA: INSPECTION_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF INSPECTION_STRUCTURE,
      WA_INSPECTION LIKE INSPECTION_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF DEFECT_STRUCTURE,
        PRUEFLOS LIKE QAVE-PRUEFLOS,
        VORGLFNR LIKE QAVE-VORGLFNR,
        MERKNR LIKE QAVE-MERKNR,
        FEHLART LIKE QAVE-FEHLART,
        FEHLKLASSE LIKE QAVE-FEHLKLASSE,
        ANZFEHLER TYPE I,
        FEHLBEWERTUNG TYPE QAVE-FEHLBEWERTUNG,
        DEFECT_SEVERITY TYPE C,
        DEFECT_DESCRIPTION LIKE QPCT-KURZTEXT,
      END OF DEFECT_STRUCTURE.

DATA: DEFECT_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF DEFECT_STRUCTURE,
      WA_DEFECT LIKE DEFECT_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF MATERIAL_SUMMARY,
        MATNR LIKE QALS-MATNR,
        MAT_DESC LIKE QPCT-KURZTEXT,
        TOTAL_INSPECTIONS TYPE I,
        PASSED_COUNT TYPE I,
        REJECTED_COUNT TYPE I,
        ACCEPTANCE_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        AVG_DEFECTS_PER_INSPECTION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_DEFECTS TYPE I,
      END OF MATERIAL_SUMMARY.

DATA: MAT_SUM_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF MATERIAL_SUMMARY,
      WA_MAT_SUM LIKE MATERIAL_SUMMARY.

DATA: BEGIN OF WORK_CENTER_ANALYSIS,
        PRUEFGRP LIKE QALS-PRUEFGRP,
        GROUP_DESC LIKE QPCT-KURZTEXT,
        INSPECTION_COUNT TYPE I,
        REJECTION_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        AVG_INSPECTION_TIME TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF WORK_CENTER_ANALYSIS.

DATA: WC_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF WORK_CENTER_ANALYSIS,
      WA_WC LIKE WORK_CENTER_ANALYSIS.

DATA: LV_TOTAL_INSPECTIONS TYPE I,
      LV_TOTAL_PASSED TYPE I,
      LV_TOTAL_REJECTED TYPE I,
      LV_OVERALL_ACCEPTANCE_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_TOTAL_DEFECTS TYPE I,
      LV_CURRENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_START_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_END_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_COMPANY_NAME TYPE T001-BUTXT.

SELECT-OPTIONS: S_MATNR FOR QALS-MATNR,
                S_WERKS FOR QALS-WERKS DEFAULT '1000',
                S_PRUEFLOS FOR QALS-PRUEFLOS,
                S_ENSTEHDAT FOR QALS-ENSTEHDAT DEFAULT SY-DATUM,
                S_PRUEFART FOR QALS-PRUEFART,
                S_PRUEFGRP FOR QALS-PRUEFGRP.

PARAMETERS: P_MASTER RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA DEFAULT 'X',
            P_MATERIAL RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_WORKCENTER RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_DEFECT RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_REJECTED AS CHECKBOX,
            P_PASSED AS CHECKBOX,
            P_INCLUDE_HISTORY AS CHECKBOX,
            P_GRAPHICAL AS CHECKBOX.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  LV_CURRENT_DATE = SY-DATUM.
  LV_START_DATE = S_ENSTEHDAT-LOW.
  LV_END_DATE = S_ENSTEHDAT-HIGH.

  PERFORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  PERFORM FETCH_INSPECTION_DATA.
  PERFORM FETCH_DEFECT_DATA.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_INSPECTION_RESULTS.
  PERFORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  PERFORM GENERATE_DASHBOARD.

TOP-OF-PAGE.
  WRITE: / 'Quality Inspection Dashboard',
         / 'Company:', LV_COMPANY_NAME,
         / 'Period:', LV_START_DATE, 'to', LV_END_DATE,
         / 'Generated:', SY-DATUM, 'Time:', SY-UZEIT.
  ULINE.

FORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  SELECT SINGLE BUTXT FROM T001 INTO LV_COMPANY_NAME
    WHERE BUKRS = S_WERKS-LOW.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_INSPECTION_DATA.
  SELECT PRUEFLOS MATNR WERKS PRUEFART PRUEFGRP PRSTUFE
         LOSMENGE ENTNAHME BESTEHTEXT ENSTEHDAT AUFNR
         PLNAL PLNTY VORNR STAT02 STAT03 STAT04 STAT05
         STAT06 STAT07 STAT08 STAT09 STAT10
    FROM QALS
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE INSPECTION_TAB
    WHERE MATNR IN S_MATNR
      AND WERKS IN S_WERKS
      AND PRUEFLOS IN S_PRUEFLOS
      AND ENSTEHDAT IN S_ENSTEHDAT
      AND PRUEFART IN S_PRUEFART
      AND PRUEFGRP IN S_PRUEFGRP.

  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'No inspection lots found' TYPE 'W'.
    STOP.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_DEFECT_DATA.
  SELECT PRUEFLOS VORGLFNR MERKNR FEHLART FEHLKLASSE
         ANZFEHLER FEHLBEWERTUNG
    FROM QAVE
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE DEFECT_TAB
    FOR ALL ENTRIES IN INSPECTION_TAB
    WHERE PRUEFLOS = INSPECTION_TAB-PRUEFLOS.

  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    LOOP AT DEFECT_TAB INTO WA_DEFECT.
      SELECT SINGLE KURZTEXT FROM QPCT
        INTO WA_DEFECT-DEFECT_DESCRIPTION
        WHERE FEHLART = WA_DEFECT-FEHLART
          AND SPRACHE = 'EN'.

      CASE WA_DEFECT-FEHLBEWERTUNG.
        WHEN '1'. WA_DEFECT-DEFECT_SEVERITY = 'M'.
        WHEN '2'. WA_DEFECT-DEFECT_SEVERITY = 'I'.
        WHEN '3'. WA_DEFECT-DEFECT_SEVERITY = 'C'.
        WHEN OTHERS. WA_DEFECT-DEFECT_SEVERITY = 'U'.
      ENDCASE.

      MODIFY DEFECT_TAB FROM WA_DEFECT.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_INSPECTION_RESULTS.
  LOOP AT INSPECTION_TAB INTO WA_INSPECTION.
    WA_INSPECTION-PASS_QTY = 0.
    WA_INSPECTION-REJECT_QTY = 0.
    WA_INSPECTION-SKIP_QTY = 0.
    WA_INSPECTION-TOTAL_DEFECTS = 0.
    WA_INSPECTION-SEVERITY_SCORE = 0.

    LOOP AT DEFECT_TAB INTO WA_DEFECT WHERE PRUEFLOS = WA_INSPECTION-PRUEFLOS.
      WA_INSPECTION-TOTAL_DEFECTS = WA_INSPECTION-TOTAL_DEFECTS + WA_DEFECT-ANZFEHLER.

      CASE WA_DEFECT-DEFECT_SEVERITY.
        WHEN 'C'. WA_INSPECTION-SEVERITY_SCORE = WA_INSPECTION-SEVERITY_SCORE + 10.
        WHEN 'I'. WA_INSPECTION-SEVERITY_SCORE = WA_INSPECTION-SEVERITY_SCORE + 5.
        WHEN 'M'. WA_INSPECTION-SEVERITY_SCORE = WA_INSPECTION-SEVERITY_SCORE + 2.
      ENDCASE.
    ENDLOOP.

    IF WA_INSPECTION-STAT02 = '1'.
      WA_INSPECTION-INSPECTION_RESULT = 'P'.
      WA_INSPECTION-RESULT_TEXT = 'Passed'.
      WA_INSPECTION-PASS_QTY = WA_INSPECTION-LOSMENGE - WA_INSPECTION-REJECT_QTY.
    ELSEIF WA_INSPECTION-STAT03 = '1'.
      WA_INSPECTION-INSPECTION_RESULT = 'R'.
      WA_INSPECTION-RESULT_TEXT = 'Rejected'.
      WA_INSPECTION-REJECT_QTY = WA_INSPECTION-LOSMENGE.
    ELSEIF WA_INSPECTION-STAT02 = '0' AND WA_INSPECTION-STAT03 = '0'.
      WA_INSPECTION-INSPECTION_RESULT = 'S'.
      WA_INSPECTION-RESULT_TEXT = 'In Process'.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_INSPECTION-LOSMENGE > 0.
      WA_INSPECTION-ACCEPTANCE_RATE = ( WA_INSPECTION-PASS_QTY / WA_INSPECTION-LOSMENGE ) * 100.
    ENDIF.

    WA_INSPECTION-INSPECTION_DURATION = WA_INSPECTION-ENTNAHME / 60.

    MODIFY INSPECTION_TAB FROM WA_INSPECTION.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  IF P_MASTER = 'X' OR P_MATERIAL = 'X'.
    PERFORM MATERIAL_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_MASTER = 'X' OR P_WORKCENTER = 'X'.
    PERFORM WORK_CENTER_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM MATERIAL_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT INSPECTION_TAB INTO WA_INSPECTION.
    WA_MAT_SUM-MATNR = WA_INSPECTION-MATNR.
    WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_INSPECTIONS = WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_INSPECTIONS + 1.
    WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_DEFECTS = WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_DEFECTS + WA_INSPECTION-TOTAL_DEFECTS.

    IF WA_INSPECTION-INSPECTION_RESULT = 'P'.
      WA_MAT_SUM-PASSED_COUNT = WA_MAT_SUM-PASSED_COUNT + 1.
    ELSEIF WA_INSPECTION-INSPECTION_RESULT = 'R'.
      WA_MAT_SUM-REJECTED_COUNT = WA_MAT_SUM-REJECTED_COUNT + 1.
    ENDIF.

    COLLECT WA_MAT_SUM INTO MAT_SUM_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_MAT_SUM.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT MAT_SUM_TAB INTO WA_MAT_SUM.
    IF WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_INSPECTIONS > 0.
      WA_MAT_SUM-ACCEPTANCE_RATE =
        ( WA_MAT_SUM-PASSED_COUNT / WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_INSPECTIONS ) * 100.
      WA_MAT_SUM-AVG_DEFECTS_PER_INSPECTION =
        WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_DEFECTS / WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_INSPECTIONS.
      MODIFY MAT_SUM_TAB FROM WA_MAT_SUM.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT MAT_SUM_TAB BY ACCEPTANCE_RATE ASCENDING.
ENDFORM.

FORM WORK_CENTER_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT INSPECTION_TAB INTO WA_INSPECTION.
    WA_WC-PRUEFGRP = WA_INSPECTION-PRUEFGRP.
    WA_WC-INSPECTION_COUNT = WA_WC-INSPECTION_COUNT + 1.
    WA_WC-AVG_INSPECTION_TIME = WA_WC-AVG_INSPECTION_TIME + WA_INSPECTION-INSPECTION_DURATION.

    IF WA_INSPECTION-INSPECTION_RESULT = 'R'.
      WA_WC-REJECTION_RATE = WA_WC-REJECTION_RATE + 1.
    ENDIF.

    COLLECT WA_WC INTO WC_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_WC.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT WC_TAB INTO WA_WC.
    IF WA_WC-INSPECTION_COUNT > 0.
      WA_WC-REJECTION_RATE = ( WA_WC-REJECTION_RATE / WA_WC-INSPECTION_COUNT ) * 100.
      WA_WC-AVG_INSPECTION_TIME = WA_WC-AVG_INSPECTION_TIME / WA_WC-INSPECTION_COUNT.
      MODIFY WC_TAB FROM WA_WC.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT WC_TAB BY REJECTION_RATE DESCENDING.
ENDFORM.

FORM GENERATE_DASHBOARD.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_GLOBAL_STATISTICS.

  WRITE: / '=== Global Quality Statistics ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Total Inspections:', LV_TOTAL_INSPECTIONS,
         'Passed:', LV_TOTAL_PASSED,
         'Rejected:', LV_TOTAL_REJECTED,
         'Acceptance Rate:', LV_OVERALL_ACCEPTANCE_RATE, '%'.
  WRITE: / 'Total Defects:', LV_TOTAL_DEFECTS,
         'Avg Defects/Inspection:',
         COND #( WHEN LV_TOTAL_INSPECTIONS > 0
                 THEN LV_TOTAL_DEFECTS / LV_TOTAL_INSPECTIONS
                 ELSE 0 ).
  ULINE.
  SKIP.

  IF P_MASTER = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_MASTER_VIEW.
  ELSEIF P_MATERIAL = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_MATERIAL_VIEW.
  ELSEIF P_WORKCENTER = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_WORK_CENTER_VIEW.
  ELSEIF P_DEFECT = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_DEFECT_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_REJECTED = 'X'.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_REJECTED_INSPECTIONS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_PASSED = 'X'.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_PASSED_INSPECTIONS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_GRAPHICAL = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_GRAPHICAL_SUMMARY.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_GLOBAL_STATISTICS.
  LV_TOTAL_INSPECTIONS = LINES( INSPECTION_TAB ).
  LV_TOTAL_PASSED = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_REJECTED = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_DEFECTS = 0.

  LOOP AT INSPECTION_TAB INTO WA_INSPECTION.
    IF WA_INSPECTION-INSPECTION_RESULT = 'P'.
      LV_TOTAL_PASSED = LV_TOTAL_PASSED + 1.
    ELSEIF WA_INSPECTION-INSPECTION_RESULT = 'R'.
      LV_TOTAL_REJECTED = LV_TOTAL_REJECTED + 1.
    ENDIF.

    LV_TOTAL_DEFECTS = LV_TOTAL_DEFECTS + WA_INSPECTION-TOTAL_DEFECTS.
  ENDLOOP.

  IF LV_TOTAL_INSPECTIONS > 0.
    LV_OVERALL_ACCEPTANCE_RATE = ( LV_TOTAL_PASSED / LV_TOTAL_INSPECTIONS ) * 100.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_MASTER_VIEW.
  WRITE: / '=== Master Dashboard View ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Material', 'Inspections', 'Passed', 'Rejected', 'Acceptance %', 'Defects'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT MAT_SUM_TAB INTO WA_MAT_SUM.
    WRITE: / WA_MAT_SUM-MATNR, WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_INSPECTIONS,
             WA_MAT_SUM-PASSED_COUNT, WA_MAT_SUM-REJECTED_COUNT,
             WA_MAT_SUM-ACCEPTANCE_RATE, WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_DEFECTS.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_MATERIAL_VIEW.
  WRITE: / '=== Material Quality Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Material', 'Inspections', 'Pass Rate', 'Defect Rate', 'Critical Defects'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT MAT_SUM_TAB INTO WA_MAT_SUM WHERE ACCEPTANCE_RATE < 80.
    WRITE: / WA_MAT_SUM-MATNR, WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_INSPECTIONS,
             WA_MAT_SUM-ACCEPTANCE_RATE, '%',
             100 - WA_MAT_SUM-ACCEPTANCE_RATE, '%',
             WA_MAT_SUM-TOTAL_DEFECTS.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_WORK_CENTER_VIEW.
  WRITE: / '=== Work Center Quality Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Work Center', 'Inspections', 'Rejection %', 'Avg Time (min)'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT WC_TAB INTO WA_WC.
    WRITE: / WA_WC-PRUEFGRP, WA_WC-INSPECTION_COUNT,
             WA_WC-REJECTION_RATE, WA_WC-AVG_INSPECTION_TIME.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_DEFECT_ANALYSIS.
  DATA: DEFECT_COUNTER TYPE I,
        DEFECT_SEVERITY_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF STRING.

  WRITE: / '=== Defect Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Defect Type', 'Description', 'Count', 'Severity'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT DEFECT_TAB INTO WA_DEFECT.
    DEFECT_COUNTER = DEFECT_COUNTER + 1.
    WRITE: / WA_DEFECT-FEHLART, WA_DEFECT-DEFECT_DESCRIPTION(20),
             WA_DEFECT-ANZFEHLER, WA_DEFECT-DEFECT_SEVERITY.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_REJECTED_INSPECTIONS.
  WRITE: / '=== Rejected Inspections Details ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Lot No', 'Material', 'Date', 'Quantity', 'Defects', 'Severity'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT INSPECTION_TAB INTO WA_INSPECTION WHERE INSPECTION_RESULT = 'R'.
    WRITE: / WA_INSPECTION-PRUEFLOS, WA_INSPECTION-MATNR,
             WA_INSPECTION-ENSTEHDAT, WA_INSPECTION-LOSMENGE,
             WA_INSPECTION-TOTAL_DEFECTS, WA_INSPECTION-SEVERITY_SCORE.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_PASSED_INSPECTIONS.
  WRITE: / '=== Passed Inspections Details ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Lot No', 'Material', 'Date', 'Quantity', 'Defects'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT INSPECTION_TAB INTO WA_INSPECTION WHERE INSPECTION_RESULT = 'P'.
    WRITE: / WA_INSPECTION-PRUEFLOS, WA_INSPECTION-MATNR,
             WA_INSPECTION-ENSTEHDAT, WA_INSPECTION-LOSMENGE,
             WA_INSPECTION-TOTAL_DEFECTS.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_GRAPHICAL_SUMMARY.
  DATA: LV_BAR_LENGTH TYPE I,
        LV_SCALE TYPE I.

  WRITE: / '=== Graphical Quality Summary ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Legend: P=Passed, R=Rejected, S=In Process'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT INSPECTION_TAB INTO WA_INSPECTION.
    LV_BAR_LENGTH = WA_INSPECTION-ACCEPTANCE_RATE / 2.
    WRITE: / WA_INSPECTION-PRUEFLOS, '[' NO-GAP,
             SY-FILL( LV_BAR_LENGTH ) FILLED WITH '*' NO-GAP,
             ']' NO-GAP,
             WA_INSPECTION-ACCEPTANCE_RATE, '%',
             WA_INSPECTION-RESULT_TEXT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

AT LINE-SELECTION.
  PERFORM DRILLDOWN_INSPECTION_DETAILS.

FORM DRILLDOWN_INSPECTION_DETAILS.
  READ TABLE INSPECTION_TAB INTO WA_INSPECTION INDEX SY-LISEL.
  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    SET PARAMETER ID 'QAL' FIELD WA_INSPECTION-PRUEFLOS.
    CALL TRANSACTION 'QA32' AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

output.program_summary: This quality inspection dashboard provides comprehensive visibility into manufacturing quality performance, tracking inspection lots, defects, and acceptance rates across materials and work centers. It is designed for quality managers and production supervisors to monitor quality KPIs and identify areas for improvement.
output.logical_flow:
1. User selects materials, plants, inspection lots, creation dates, inspection types, and work centers.
2. Inspection lot data is fetched from QALS table with comprehensive status fields.
3. Defect data is retrieved from QAVE with detailed defect classifications.
4. Defect severity is mapped from FEHLBEWERTUNG: C=Critical, I=Important, M=Minor.
5. Inspection results are determined from STAT fields: P=Passed, R=Rejected, S=In Process.
6. Acceptance rates are calculated as passed quantity divided by total lot quantity.
7. Material summary analysis aggregates inspection counts, pass/fail rates, and defect metrics.
8. Work center analysis calculates rejection rates and average inspection times.
9. Dashboard includes multiple views: Master, Material, Work Center, and Defect analysis.
10. Users can filter to show only rejected or passed inspections.
11. Graphical bar chart visualization shows acceptance rates per inspection lot.
12. Double-click navigates to transaction QA32 for detailed inspection lot display.
key_data_structures: INSPECTION_STRUCTURE: Comprehensive inspection lot data with calculated quality metrics.
INSPECTION_TAB: Main internal table storing all inspection lots and results.
DEFECT_STRUCTURE: Detailed defect records with severity classification and descriptions.
DEFECT_TAB: Internal table for defect data linked to inspection lots.
MATERIAL_SUMMARY: Aggregated quality metrics per material.
MAT_SUM_TAB: Internal table for material quality analysis.
WORK_CENTER_ANALYSIS: Aggregated quality metrics per work center.
WC_TAB: Internal table for work center analysis.
output.technical_notes: The program uses QALS status fields STAT02-STAT10 to determine inspection outcomes. Defect severity classification uses FEHLBEWERTUNG mapping. The acceptance rate calculation considers both passed quantity and total lot quantity. The graphical view creates simple bar charts using asterisks proportional to acceptance rates. The COLLECT statement aggregates data at material and work center levels.

input:
REPORT Z_PRODUCTION_ORDER_CAPACITY_PLANNING.

TABLES: AFKO, AFPO, AFFH, AFVC, AFVV, CRHD, CRCO, T001, MARA.

DATA: BEGIN OF PRODUCTION_ORDER_STRUCTURE,
        AUFNR LIKE AFKO-AUFNR,
        AUART LIKE AFKO-AUART,
        AUFTEXT LIKE AFKO-AUFTEXT,
        GSTRP LIKE AFKO-GSTRP,
        GLTRP LIKE AFKO-GLTRP,
        GSUBS LIKE AFKO-GSUBS,
        GSUBR LIKE AFKO-GSUBR,
        PLNNR LIKE AFKO-PLNNR,
        PLNAL LIKE AFKO-PLNAL,
        MATNR LIKE AFPO-MATNR,
        WERKS LIKE AFPO-WERKS,
        MAT_DESC LIKE MARA-MAKTX,
        PLMENGE LIKE AFPO-PLMENGE,
        MEINS LIKE AFPO-MEINS,
        CAPACITY_REQUIRED TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        CAPACITY_AVAILABLE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        CAPACITY_UTILIZATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        LOAD_STATUS TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        LOAD_STATUS_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        SHORTFALL TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        REQUIRED_RESOURCE TYPE CHAR10,
      END OF PRODUCTION_ORDER_STRUCTURE.

DATA: PROD_ORDER_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF PRODUCTION_ORDER_STRUCTURE,
      WA_PROD_ORDER LIKE PRODUCTION_ORDER_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF WORK_CENTER_CAPACITY_STRUCTURE,
        ARBPL LIKE CRHD-ARBPL,
        WERKS LIKE CRHD-WERKS,
        KAPAR LIKE CRHD-KAPAR,
        PLANT_NAME LIKE T001-BUTXT,
        TOTAL_CAPACITY TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        UTILIZED_CAPACITY TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        AVAILABLE_CAPACITY TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        UTILIZATION_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        REQUIRED_CAPACITY TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        ORDER_COUNT TYPE I,
        RESOURCE_DESCRIPTION TYPE CHAR40,
      END OF WORK_CENTER_CAPACITY_STRUCTURE.

DATA: WC_CAP_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF WORK_CENTER_CAPACITY_STRUCTURE,
      WA_WC_CAP LIKE WORK_CENTER_CAPACITY_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF CAPACITY_LOAD_STRUCTURE,
        DATE_TYPE TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        DATE_PERIOD TYPE SY-DATUM,
        PLANNED_CAPACITY TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        ACTUAL_CAPACITY TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        PROJECTED_CAPACITY TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        UTILIZATION_PCT TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF CAPACITY_LOAD_STRUCTURE.

DATA: LOAD_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF CAPACITY_LOAD_STRUCTURE,
      WA_LOAD LIKE CAPACITY_LOAD_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF MATERIAL_BACKLOG,
        MATNR LIKE AFPO-MATNR,
        MAT_DESC LIKE MARA-MAKTX,
        REQUIRED_QTY TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        PRODUCED_QTY TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        BACKLOG_QTY TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        BACKLOG_DAYS TYPE I,
      END OF MATERIAL_BACKLOG.

DATA: BACKLOG_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF MATERIAL_BACKLOG,
      WA_BACKLOG LIKE MATERIAL_BACKLOG.

DATA: LV_TOTAL_ORDERS TYPE I,
      LV_OVERLOADED_WC TYPE I,
      LV_UNDERUTILIZED_WC TYPE I,
      LV_TOTAL_CAPACITY TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_TOTAL_UTILIZATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_CURRENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_START_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_END_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_PLANNING_HORIZON TYPE I VALUE 30,
      LV_COMPANY_NAME TYPE T001-BUTXT,
      LV_GLOBAL_UTILIZATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2.

SELECT-OPTIONS: S_AUFNR FOR AFKO-AUFNR,
                S_MATNR FOR AFPO-MATNR,
                S_WERKS FOR AFPO-WERKS DEFAULT '1000',
                S_ARBPL FOR CRHD-ARBPL,
                S_GSTRP FOR AFKO-GSTRP DEFAULT SY-DATUM,
                S_GLTRP FOR AFKO-GLTRP.

PARAMETERS: P_ORDERS RADIOBUTTON GROUP VEW DEFAULT 'X',
            P_WORKCENTER RADIOBUTTON GROUP VEW,
            P_BACKLOG RADIOBUTTON GROUP VEW,
            P_CRITICAL_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2 DEFAULT 85,
            P_CAPACITY_UNIT TYPE C LENGTH 2 DEFAULT 'HR',
            P_DETAILED AS CHECKBOX,
            P_FORECAST AS CHECKBOX.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  LV_CURRENT_DATE = SY-DATUM.
  LV_START_DATE = S_GSTRP-LOW.
  LV_END_DATE = S_GLTRP-HIGH.

  PERFORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  PERFORM FETCH_PRODUCTION_ORDERS.
  PERFORM FETCH_WORK_CENTER_DATA.
  PERFORM FETCH_CAPACITY_DATA.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_CAPACITY_REQUIREMENTS.
  PERFORM PERFORM_BACKLOG_ANALYSIS.
  PERFORM GENERATE_CAPACITY_REPORT.

TOP-OF-PAGE.
  WRITE: / 'Production Order Capacity Planning Report',
         / 'Company:', LV_COMPANY_NAME,
         / 'Planning Period:', LV_START_DATE, 'to', LV_END_DATE,
         / 'Critical Utilization Threshold:', P_CRITICAL_RATE, '%',
         / 'Generated:', SY-DATUM, 'Time:', SY-UZEIT.
  ULINE.

FORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  SELECT SINGLE BUTXT FROM T001 INTO LV_COMPANY_NAME
    WHERE WERKS = S_WERKS-LOW.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_PRODUCTION_ORDERS.
  SELECT A~AUFNR A~AUART A~AUFTEXT A~GSTRP A~GLTRP
         A~GSUBS A~GSUBR A~PLNNR A~PLNAL
         B~MATNR B~WERKS B~PLMENGE B~MEINS
    FROM AFKO AS A
    INNER JOIN AFPO AS B ON A~AUFNR = B~AUFNR
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE PROD_ORDER_TAB
    WHERE A~AUFNR IN S_AUFNR
      AND B~MATNR IN S_MATNR
      AND B~WERKS IN S_WERKS
      AND A~GSTRP IN S_GSTRP
      AND A~GLTRP IN S_GLTRP
      AND A~AUART = 'PP01'.

  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'No production orders found for the selection' TYPE 'W'.
    STOP.
  ENDIF.

  LOOP AT PROD_ORDER_TAB INTO WA_PROD_ORDER.
    SELECT SINGLE MAKTX FROM MARA INTO WA_PROD_ORDER-MAT_DESC
      WHERE MATNR = WA_PROD_ORDER-MATNR.
    MODIFY PROD_ORDER_TAB FROM WA_PROD_ORDER.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_WORK_CENTER_DATA.
  SELECT ARBPL WERKS KAPAR
    FROM CRHD
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE WC_CAP_TAB
    WHERE WERKS IN S_WERKS
      AND ARBPL IN S_ARBPL.

  LOOP AT WC_CAP_TAB INTO WA_WC_CAP.
    SELECT SINGLE BUTXT FROM T001 INTO WA_WC_CAP-PLANT_NAME
      WHERE WERKS = WA_WC_CAP-WERKS.

    SELECT SINGLE KAPAZITAET1 KAPAZITAET2
      FROM CRCO
      INTO @DATA(WA_CRCO)
      WHERE ARBPL = WA_WC_CAP-ARBPL
        AND WERKS = WA_WC_CAP-WERKS.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_WC_CAP-TOTAL_CAPACITY = WA_CRCO-KAPAZITAET1.
      WA_WC_CAP-AVAILABLE_CAPACITY = WA_CRCO-KAPAZITAET2.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY WC_CAP_TAB FROM WA_WC_CAP.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_CAPACITY_DATA.
  LOOP AT PROD_ORDER_TAB INTO WA_PROD_ORDER.
    SELECT SINGLE DAUNOR DAUNOE
      FROM AFVC
      INTO @DATA(WA_AFVC)
      WHERE AUFNR = WA_PROD_ORDER-AUFNR.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_REQUIRED = WA_AFVC-DAUNOR.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT SINGLE ARBEIT
      FROM AFVV
      INTO @DATA(WA_AFVV)
      WHERE AUFNR = WA_PROD_ORDER-AUFNR.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_REQUIRED = WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_REQUIRED + WA_AFVV-ARBEIT.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY PROD_ORDER_TAB FROM WA_PROD_ORDER.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_CAPACITY_REQUIREMENTS.
  LOOP AT WC_CAP_TAB INTO WA_WC_CAP.
    WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZED_CAPACITY = 0.
    WA_WC_CAP-ORDER_COUNT = 0.

    LOOP AT PROD_ORDER_TAB INTO WA_PROD_ORDER WHERE WERKS = WA_WC_CAP-WERKS.
      WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZED_CAPACITY = WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZED_CAPACITY + WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_REQUIRED.
      WA_WC_CAP-ORDER_COUNT = WA_WC_CAP-ORDER_COUNT + 1.
    ENDLOOP.

    IF WA_WC_CAP-TOTAL_CAPACITY > 0.
      WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZATION_RATE = ( WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZED_CAPACITY / WA_WC_CAP-TOTAL_CAPACITY ) * 100.
      WA_WC_CAP-REQUIRED_CAPACITY = WA_WC_CAP-TOTAL_CAPACITY - WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZED_CAPACITY.

      IF WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZATION_RATE > P_CRITICAL_RATE.
        WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZATION_RATE = 'O'.
        WA_WC_CAP-RESOURCE_DESCRIPTION = 'Overloaded'.
        LV_OVERLOADED_WC = LV_OVERLOADED_WC + 1.
      ELSEIF WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZATION_RATE < 50.
        WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZATION_RATE = 'U'.
        WA_WC_CAP-RESOURCE_DESCRIPTION = 'Underutilized'.
        LV_UNDERUTILIZED_WC = LV_UNDERUTILIZED_WC + 1.
      ELSE.
        WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZATION_RATE = 'B'.
        WA_WC_CAP-RESOURCE_DESCRIPTION = 'Balanced'.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY WC_CAP_TAB FROM WA_WC_CAP.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT PROD_ORDER_TAB INTO WA_PROD_ORDER.
    READ TABLE WC_CAP_TAB INTO WA_WC_CAP
         WITH KEY WERKS = WA_PROD_ORDER-WERKS.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_AVAILABLE = WA_WC_CAP-TOTAL_CAPACITY.
      WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_UTILIZATION = WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_REQUIRED / WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_AVAILABLE * 100.

      IF WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_UTILIZATION > P_CRITICAL_RATE.
        WA_PROD_ORDER-LOAD_STATUS = 'C'.
        WA_PROD_ORDER-LOAD_STATUS_TEXT = 'Critical'.
        WA_PROD_ORDER-SHORTFALL = WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_REQUIRED - WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_AVAILABLE.
      ELSEIF WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_UTILIZATION > 70.
        WA_PROD_ORDER-LOAD_STATUS = 'H'.
        WA_PROD_ORDER-LOAD_STATUS_TEXT = 'High'.
      ELSE.
        WA_PROD_ORDER-LOAD_STATUS = 'N'.
        WA_PROD_ORDER-LOAD_STATUS_TEXT = 'Normal'.
      ENDIF.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY PROD_ORDER_TAB FROM WA_PROD_ORDER.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM PERFORM_BACKLOG_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT PROD_ORDER_TAB INTO WA_PROD_ORDER.
    WA_BACKLOG-MATNR = WA_PROD_ORDER-MATNR.
    WA_BACKLOG-MAT_DESC = WA_PROD_ORDER-MAT_DESC.
    WA_BACKLOG-REQUIRED_QTY = WA_BACKLOG-REQUIRED_QTY + WA_PROD_ORDER-PLMENGE.
    WA_BACKLOG-PRODUCED_QTY = WA_BACKLOG-PRODUCED_QTY + ( WA_PROD_ORDER-PLMENGE * 0.8 ).

    COLLECT WA_BACKLOG INTO BACKLOG_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_BACKLOG.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT BACKLOG_TAB INTO WA_BACKLOG.
    WA_BACKLOG-BACKLOG_QTY = WA_BACKLOG-REQUIRED_QTY - WA_BACKLOG-PRODUCED_QTY.
    WA_BACKLOG-BACKLOG_DAYS = WA_BACKLOG-BACKLOG_QTY / 10.
    MODIFY BACKLOG_TAB FROM WA_BACKLOG.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM GENERATE_CAPACITY_REPORT.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_GLOBAL_CAPACITY.

  IF P_ORDERS = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_ORDER_CAPACITY.
  ELSEIF P_WORKCENTER = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_WORK_CENTER_CAPACITY.
  ELSEIF P_BACKLOG = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_BACKLOG_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_DETAILED = 'X'.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_DETAILED_CAPACITY.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_FORECAST = 'X'.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_CAPACITY_FORECAST.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_GLOBAL_CAPACITY.
  LV_TOTAL_ORDERS = LINES( PROD_ORDER_TAB ).
  LV_TOTAL_CAPACITY = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_UTILIZATION = 0.

  LOOP AT PROD_ORDER_TAB INTO WA_PROD_ORDER.
    LV_TOTAL_CAPACITY = LV_TOTAL_CAPACITY + WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_REQUIRED.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT WC_CAP_TAB INTO WA_WC_CAP.
    LV_TOTAL_UTILIZATION = LV_TOTAL_UTILIZATION + WA_WC_CAP-TOTAL_CAPACITY.
  ENDLOOP.

  IF LV_TOTAL_UTILIZATION > 0.
    LV_GLOBAL_UTILIZATION = ( LV_TOTAL_CAPACITY / LV_TOTAL_UTILIZATION ) * 100.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_ORDER_CAPACITY.
  WRITE: / '=== Production Order Capacity View ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Order', 'Material', 'Description', 'Required', 'Available',
           'Utilization %', 'Status', 'Shortfall'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT PROD_ORDER_TAB INTO WA_PROD_ORDER.
    WRITE: / WA_PROD_ORDER-AUFNR, WA_PROD_ORDER-MATNR,
             WA_PROD_ORDER-MAT_DESC(15),
             WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_REQUIRED,
             WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_AVAILABLE,
             WA_PROD_ORDER-CAPACITY_UTILIZATION,
             WA_PROD_ORDER-LOAD_STATUS_TEXT,
             WA_PROD_ORDER-SHORTFALL.
  ENDLOOP.

  ULINE.
  WRITE: / 'Total Orders:', LV_TOTAL_ORDERS,
         'Global Utilization:', LV_GLOBAL_UTILIZATION, '%'.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_WORK_CENTER_CAPACITY.
  WRITE: / '=== Work Center Capacity Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Work Center', 'Plant', 'Total Cap', 'Utilized',
           'Available', 'Utilization %', 'Status', 'Orders'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT WC_CAP_TAB INTO WA_WC_CAP.
    WRITE: / WA_WC_CAP-ARBPL, WA_WC_CAP-PLANT_NAME(10),
             WA_WC_CAP-TOTAL_CAPACITY,
             WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZED_CAPACITY,
             WA_WC_CAP-REQUIRED_CAPACITY,
             WA_WC_CAP-UTILIZATION_RATE,
             WA_WC_CAP-RESOURCE_DESCRIPTION,
             WA_WC_CAP-ORDER_COUNT.
  ENDLOOP.

  ULINE.
  WRITE: / 'Overloaded Work Centers:', LV_OVERLOADED_WC,
         'Underutilized:', LV_UNDERUTILIZED_WC.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_BACKLOG_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Material Backlog Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Material', 'Description', 'Required', 'Produced',
           'Backlog', 'Backlog Days'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT BACKLOG_TAB INTO WA_BACKLOG.
    WRITE: / WA_BACKLOG-MATNR, WA_BACKLOG-MAT_DESC(15),
             WA_BACKLOG-REQUIRED_QTY,
             WA_BACKLOG-PRODUCED_QTY,
             WA_BACKLOG-BACKLOG_QTY,
             WA_BACKLOG-BACKLOG_DAYS.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_DETAILED_CAPACITY.
  DATA: LV_DAY TYPE SY-DATUM,
        LV_WEEK TYPE I.

  WRITE: / '=== Detailed Capacity Load Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Period', 'Planned Cap', 'Actual Cap', 'Projected Cap', 'Utilization %'.
  ULINE.

  DO 10 TIMES VARYING LV_DAY FROM LV_CURRENT_DATE NEXT LV_DAY + 7.
    WA_LOAD-DATE_PERIOD = LV_DAY.
    WA_LOAD-PLANNED_CAPACITY = 1600.
    WA_LOAD-ACTUAL_CAPACITY = 1400 + SY-INDEX * 50.
    WA_LOAD-PROJECTED_CAPACITY = 1500 + SY-INDEX * 30.
    WA_LOAD-UTILIZATION_PCT = ( WA_LOAD-ACTUAL_CAPACITY / WA_LOAD-PLANNED_CAPACITY ) * 100.

    APPEND WA_LOAD TO LOAD_TAB.
  ENDDO.

  LOOP AT LOAD_TAB INTO WA_LOAD.
    WRITE: / WA_LOAD-DATE_PERIOD,
             WA_LOAD-PLANNED_CAPACITY,
             WA_LOAD-ACTUAL_CAPACITY,
             WA_LOAD-PROJECTED_CAPACITY,
             WA_LOAD-UTILIZATION_PCT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_CAPACITY_FORECAST.
  DATA: LV_FORECAST_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
        LV_PREDICTED_CAP TYPE P DECIMALS 2.

  WRITE: / '=== Capacity Forecast ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Date', 'Predicted Capacity', 'Utilization %', 'Trend'.
  ULINE.

  DO 15 TIMES.
    LV_FORECAST_DATE = LV_CURRENT_DATE + SY-INDEX * 7.
    LV_PREDICTED_CAP = 1000 + SY-INDEX * 80.

    WRITE: / LV_FORECAST_DATE,
             LV_PREDICTED_CAP,
             LV_PREDICTED_CAP / 1200 * 100,
             COND #( WHEN LV_PREDICTED_CAP > 1800 THEN 'Increasing'
                     WHEN LV_PREDICTED_CAP < 1200 THEN 'Decreasing'
                     ELSE 'Stable' ).
  ENDDO.
ENDFORM.

AT LINE-SELECTION.
  PERFORM DRILLDOWN_ORDER_DETAILS.

FORM DRILLDOWN_ORDER_DETAILS.
  READ TABLE PROD_ORDER_TAB INTO WA_PROD_ORDER INDEX SY-LISEL.
  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    SET PARAMETER ID 'ANR' FIELD WA_PROD_ORDER-AUFNR.
    CALL TRANSACTION 'CO03' AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

output.program_summary: This production order capacity planning report analyzes capacity utilization across work centers and production orders. It is designed for production planners and operations managers to identify capacity bottlenecks, balance workload, and optimize resource allocation for manufacturing operations.
output.logical_flow:
1. User selects production orders by order number, material, plant, work center, and scheduling dates.
2. Production order header data is fetched from AFKO and AFPO (order items).
3. Work center master data is retrieved from CRHD with capacity parameters from CRCO.
4. Capacity requirements are calculated from AFVC (operation durations) and AFVV (work quantities).
5. Capacity utilization is calculated as required capacity divided by available capacity.
6. Load status is determined: Critical (>85%), High (>70%), Normal (<=70%).
7. Work center utilization is categorized: Overloaded (>85%), Balanced (50-85%), Underutilized (<50%).
8. Backlog analysis aggregates material requirements vs. actual production.
9. Detailed capacity load analysis shows planned, actual, and projected capacity by time period.
10. Capacity forecast predicts future capacity utilization trends based on current orders.
11. Double-click navigates to transaction CO03 for production order display.
key_data_structures: PRODUCTION_ORDER_STRUCTURE: Comprehensive production order data with capacity calculations.
PROD_ORDER_TAB: Main internal table storing production orders and capacity metrics.
WORK_CENTER_CAPACITY_STRUCTURE: Work center capacity data with utilization calculations.
WC_CAP_TAB: Internal table for work center capacity analysis.
CAPACITY_LOAD_STRUCTURE: Periodic capacity load analysis structure.
LOAD_TAB: Internal table for detailed capacity load over time.
MATERIAL_BACKLOG: Structure for material backlog analysis.
BACKLOG_TAB: Internal table for production backlog tracking.
output.technical_notes: The program uses AFKO (order header), AFPO (order item), AFVC (operations), and AFVV (operation quantities) to calculate capacity requirements. CRHD and CRCO provide work center capacity data. The critical utilization threshold is configurable. Capacity forecast uses simple linear projection based on current order trends. The COLLECT statement aggregates backlog data by material.

input:
REPORT Z_CUSTOMER_COMPLAINT_MANAGEMENT.

TABLES: VBAK, VBAP, KNA1, QMEL, QMSM, T001, MARA, ADRC.

DATA: BEGIN OF COMPLAINT_STRUCTURE,
        QMNUM LIKE QMEL-QMNUM,
        MATNR LIKE QMEL-MATNR,
        WERKS LIKE QMEL-WERKS,
        KUNNR LIKE QMEL-KUNNR,
        NAME1 LIKE KNA1-NAME1,
        MAKTX LIKE MARA-MAKTX,
        QMART LIKE QMEL-QMART,
        QMTXT LIKE QMEL-QMTXT,
        ERDAT LIKE QMEL-ERDAT,
        ERZEIT LIKE QMEL-ERZEIT,
        AENAM LIKE QMEL-AENAM,
        PRIOK LIKE QMEL-PRIOK,
        PRIOK_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        STATUS LIKE QMEL-STATUS,
        STATUS_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        VBELN LIKE QMEL-VBELN,
        KWMENG TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        NETWR TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        COMPLAINT_TYPE TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        COMPLAINT_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        RESPONSE_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
        RESPONSE_TEXT TYPE CHAR100,
        RESOLUTION_DAYS TYPE I,
        ESCALATED AS FLAG,
        CUSTOMER_SATISFACTION TYPE I,
        ROOT_CAUSE TYPE CHAR50,
        CORRECTIVE_ACTION TYPE CHAR100,
      END OF COMPLAINT_STRUCTURE.

DATA: COMPLAINT_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF COMPLAINT_STRUCTURE,
      WA_COMPLAINT LIKE COMPLAINT_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF COMPLAINT_CATEGORY,
        CATEGORY TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        CATEGORY_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        COMPLAINT_COUNT TYPE I,
        AVERAGE_RESOLUTION_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        ESCALATED_COUNT TYPE I,
        RESOLVED_COUNT TYPE I,
        OPEN_COUNT TYPE I,
      END OF COMPLAINT_CATEGORY.

DATA: CATEGORY_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF COMPLAINT_CATEGORY,
      WA_CATEGORY LIKE COMPLAINT_CATEGORY.

DATA: BEGIN OF CUSTOMER_COMPLAINT_SUMMARY,
        KUNNR LIKE KNA1-KUNNR,
        NAME1 LIKE KNA1-NAME1,
        TOTAL_COMPLAINTS TYPE I,
        OPEN_COMPLAINTS TYPE I,
        RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS TYPE I,
        ESCALATED_COMPLAINTS TYPE I,
        AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_COMPLAINT_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF CUSTOMER_COMPLAINT_SUMMARY.

DATA: CUST_SUM_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF CUSTOMER_COMPLAINT_SUMMARY,
      WA_CUST_SUM LIKE CUSTOMER_COMPLAINT_SUMMARY.

DATA: BEGIN OF COMPLAINT_AGING,
        AGE_BUCKET TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        BUCKET_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        COMPLAINT_COUNT TYPE I,
        ESCALATED_COUNT TYPE I,
        PERCENTAGE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF COMPLAINT_AGING.

DATA: AGING_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF COMPLAINT_AGING,
      WA_AGING LIKE COMPLAINT_AGING.

DATA: LV_TOTAL_COMPLAINTS TYPE I,
      LV_OPEN_COMPLAINTS TYPE I,
      LV_RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS TYPE I,
      LV_ESCALATED_COMPLAINTS TYPE I,
      LV_AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_CURRENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_30_DAYS_AGO TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_60_DAYS_AGO TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_90_DAYS_AGO TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_COMPANY_NAME TYPE T001-BUTXT,
      LV_CUSTOMER_SATISFACTION_SCORE TYPE P DECIMALS 2.

SELECT-OPTIONS: S_QMNUM FOR QMEL-QMNUM,
                S_MATNR FOR QMEL-MATNR,
                S_KUNNR FOR QMEL-KUNNR,
                S_WERKS FOR QMEL-WERKS DEFAULT '1000',
                S_ERDAT FOR QMEL-ERDAT DEFAULT SY-DATUM,
                S_QMART FOR QMEL-QMART,
                S_PRIOK FOR QMEL-PRIOK.

PARAMETERS: P_OVERVIEW RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA DEFAULT 'X',
            P_CUSTOMER RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_CATEGORY RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_AGING RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_OPEN AS CHECKBOX,
            P_RESOLVED AS CHECKBOX,
            P_ESCALATED AS CHECKBOX,
            P_HIGH_PRIORITY AS CHECKBOX,
            P_AUTO_RESPONSE AS CHECKBOX,
            P_EXPORT AS CHECKBOX.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  LV_CURRENT_DATE = SY-DATUM.
  LV_30_DAYS_AGO = LV_CURRENT_DATE - 30.
  LV_60_DAYS_AGO = LV_CURRENT_DATE - 60.
  LV_90_DAYS_AGO = LV_CURRENT_DATE - 90.

  PERFORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  PERFORM FETCH_COMPLAINT_DATA.
  PERFORM FETCH_SALES_ORDER_DATA.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_COMPLAINT_METRICS.
  PERFORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  PERFORM GENERATE_COMPLAINT_REPORT.

TOP-OF-PAGE.
  WRITE: / 'Customer Complaint Management Report',
         / 'Company:', LV_COMPANY_NAME,
         / 'Period:', S_ERDAT-LOW, 'to', S_ERDAT-HIGH,
         / 'Generated:', SY-DATUM, 'Time:', SY-UZEIT.
  ULINE.

FORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  SELECT SINGLE BUTXT FROM T001 INTO LV_COMPANY_NAME
    WHERE WERKS = S_WERKS-LOW.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_COMPLAINT_DATA.
  SELECT QMNUM MATNR WERKS KUNNR QMART QMTXT
         ERDAT ERZEIT AENAM PRIOK STATUS VBELN
    FROM QMEL
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE COMPLAINT_TAB
    WHERE QMNUM IN S_QMNUM
      AND MATNR IN S_MATNR
      AND KUNNR IN S_KUNNR
      AND WERKS IN S_WERKS
      AND ERDAT IN S_ERDAT
      AND QMART IN S_QMART
      AND PRIOK IN S_PRIOK.

  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'No complaints found for the selection' TYPE 'W'.
    STOP.
  ENDIF.

  LOOP AT COMPLAINT_TAB INTO WA_COMPLAINT.
    SELECT SINGLE NAME1 FROM KNA1 INTO WA_COMPLAINT-NAME1
      WHERE KUNNR = WA_COMPLAINT-KUNNR.

    SELECT SINGLE MAKTX FROM MARA INTO WA_COMPLAINT-MAKTX
      WHERE MATNR = WA_COMPLAINT-MATNR.

    CASE WA_COMPLAINT-PRIOK.
      WHEN '1'. WA_COMPLAINT-PRIOK_TEXT = 'Very High'.
      WHEN '2'. WA_COMPLAINT-PRIOK_TEXT = 'High'.
      WHEN '3'. WA_COMPLAINT-PRIOK_TEXT = 'Medium'.
      WHEN '4'. WA_COMPLAINT-PRIOK_TEXT = 'Low'.
      WHEN '5'. WA_COMPLAINT-PRIOK_TEXT = 'Very Low'.
      WHEN OTHERS. WA_COMPLAINT-PRIOK_TEXT = 'Unknown'.
    ENDCASE.

    IF WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS = 'I' OR WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS = 'P'.
      WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'In Process'.
    ELSEIF WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS = 'R'.
      WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Resolved'.
    ELSEIF WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS = 'C'.
      WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Closed'.
    ELSE.
      WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Open'.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS = 'R' OR WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS = 'C'.
      WA_COMPLAINT-RESOLUTION_DAYS = LV_CURRENT_DATE - WA_COMPLAINT-ERDAT.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_COMPLAINT-PRIOK = '1' OR WA_COMPLAINT-PRIOK = '2'.
      WA_COMPLAINT-ESCALATED = 'X'.
      WA_COMPLAINT-RESPONSE_DATE = WA_COMPLAINT-ERDAT + 1.
      WA_COMPLAINT-RESPONSE_TEXT = 'Escalated to management team'.
    ENDIF.

    CASE WA_COMPLAINT-QMART.
      WHEN '01'. WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TYPE = 'Q'.
                 WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TEXT = 'Quality Issue'.
      WHEN '02'. WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TYPE = 'D'.
                 WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TEXT = 'Delivery Issue'.
      WHEN '03'. WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TYPE = 'S'.
                 WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TEXT = 'Service Issue'.
      WHEN '04'. WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TYPE = 'B'.
                 WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TEXT = 'Billing Issue'.
      WHEN OTHERS. WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TYPE = 'O'.
