                   WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TEXT = 'Other'.
    ENDCASE.

    WA_COMPLAINT-CUSTOMER_SATISFACTION = 80 - WA_COMPLAINT-RESOLUTION_DAYS.
    IF WA_COMPLAINT-CUSTOMER_SATISFACTION < 0.
      WA_COMPLAINT-CUSTOMER_SATISFACTION = 0.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY COMPLAINT_TAB FROM WA_COMPLAINT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_SALES_ORDER_DATA.
  LOOP AT COMPLAINT_TAB INTO WA_COMPLAINT WHERE VBELN IS NOT INITIAL.
    SELECT SINGLE NETWR WAERK
      FROM VBAK
      INTO @DATA(WA_VBAK)
      WHERE VBELN = WA_COMPLAINT-VBELN.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_COMPLAINT-NETWR = WA_VBAK-NETWR.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT SINGLE KWMENG VRKME
      FROM VBAP
      INTO @DATA(WA_VBAP)
      WHERE VBELN = WA_COMPLAINT-VBELN.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_COMPLAINT-KWMENG = WA_VBAP-KWMENG.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY COMPLAINT_TAB FROM WA_COMPLAINT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_COMPLAINT_METRICS.
  LV_TOTAL_COMPLAINTS = LINES( COMPLAINT_TAB ).
  LV_OPEN_COMPLAINTS = 0.
  LV_RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS = 0.
  LV_ESCALATED_COMPLAINTS = 0.

  LOOP AT COMPLAINT_TAB INTO WA_COMPLAINT.
    IF WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Open' OR WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'In Process'.
      LV_OPEN_COMPLAINTS = LV_OPEN_COMPLAINTS + 1.
    ELSEIF WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Resolved' OR WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Closed'.
      LV_RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS = LV_RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS + 1.
      LV_AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS = LV_AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS + WA_COMPLAINT-RESOLUTION_DAYS.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_COMPLAINT-ESCALATED = 'X'.
      LV_ESCALATED_COMPLAINTS = LV_ESCALATED_COMPLAINTS + 1.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  IF LV_RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS > 0.
    LV_AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS = LV_AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS / LV_RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  IF P_CATEGORY = 'X' OR P_OVERVIEW = 'X'.
    PERFORM CATEGORY_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_CUSTOMER = 'X' OR P_OVERVIEW = 'X'.
    PERFORM CUSTOMER_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_AGING = 'X' OR P_OVERVIEW = 'X'.
    PERFORM AGING_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM CATEGORY_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT COMPLAINT_TAB INTO WA_COMPLAINT.
    WA_CATEGORY-CATEGORY = WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TYPE.
    WA_CATEGORY-CATEGORY_TEXT = WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TEXT.
    WA_CATEGORY-COMPLAINT_COUNT = WA_CATEGORY-COMPLAINT_COUNT + 1.

    IF WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Open' OR WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'In Process'.
      WA_CATEGORY-OPEN_COUNT = WA_CATEGORY-OPEN_COUNT + 1.
    ELSE.
      WA_CATEGORY-RESOLVED_COUNT = WA_CATEGORY-RESOLVED_COUNT + 1.
      WA_CATEGORY-AVERAGE_RESOLUTION_DAYS = WA_CATEGORY-AVERAGE_RESOLUTION_DAYS + WA_COMPLAINT-RESOLUTION_DAYS.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_COMPLAINT-ESCALATED = 'X'.
      WA_CATEGORY-ESCALATED_COUNT = WA_CATEGORY-ESCALATED_COUNT + 1.
    ENDIF.

    COLLECT WA_CATEGORY INTO CATEGORY_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_CATEGORY.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT CATEGORY_TAB INTO WA_CATEGORY.
    IF WA_CATEGORY-RESOLVED_COUNT > 0.
      WA_CATEGORY-AVERAGE_RESOLUTION_DAYS = WA_CATEGORY-AVERAGE_RESOLUTION_DAYS / WA_CATEGORY-RESOLVED_COUNT.
      MODIFY CATEGORY_TAB FROM WA_CATEGORY.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM CUSTOMER_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT COMPLAINT_TAB INTO WA_COMPLAINT.
    WA_CUST_SUM-KUNNR = WA_COMPLAINT-KUNNR.
    WA_CUST_SUM-NAME1 = WA_COMPLAINT-NAME1.
    WA_CUST_SUM-TOTAL_COMPLAINTS = WA_CUST_SUM-TOTAL_COMPLAINTS + 1.
    WA_CUST_SUM-TOTAL_COMPLAINT_VALUE = WA_CUST_SUM-TOTAL_COMPLAINT_VALUE + WA_COMPLAINT-NETWR.

    IF WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Open' OR WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'In Process'.
      WA_CUST_SUM-OPEN_COMPLAINTS = WA_CUST_SUM-OPEN_COMPLAINTS + 1.
    ELSE.
      WA_CUST_SUM-RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS = WA_CUST_SUM-RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS + 1.
      WA_CUST_SUM-AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS = WA_CUST_SUM-AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS + WA_COMPLAINT-RESOLUTION_DAYS.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_COMPLAINT-ESCALATED = 'X'.
      WA_CUST_SUM-ESCALATED_COMPLAINTS = WA_CUST_SUM-ESCALATED_COMPLAINTS + 1.
    ENDIF.

    COLLECT WA_CUST_SUM INTO CUST_SUM_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_CUST_SUM.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT CUST_SUM_TAB INTO WA_CUST_SUM.
    IF WA_CUST_SUM-RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS > 0.
      WA_CUST_SUM-AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS = WA_CUST_SUM-AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS / WA_CUST_SUM-RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS.
      MODIFY CUST_SUM_TAB FROM WA_CUST_SUM.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT CUST_SUM_TAB BY TOTAL_COMPLAINTS DESCENDING.
ENDFORM.

FORM AGING_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT COMPLAINT_TAB INTO WA_COMPLAINT.
    IF WA_COMPLAINT-ERDAT >= LV_30_DAYS_AGO.
      WA_AGING-AGE_BUCKET = '1'.
      WA_AGING-BUCKET_TEXT = '0-30 Days'.
    ELSEIF WA_COMPLAINT-ERDAT >= LV_60_DAYS_AGO.
      WA_AGING-AGE_BUCKET = '2'.
      WA_AGING-BUCKET_TEXT = '31-60 Days'.
    ELSEIF WA_COMPLAINT-ERDAT >= LV_90_DAYS_AGO.
      WA_AGING-AGE_BUCKET = '3'.
      WA_AGING-BUCKET_TEXT = '61-90 Days'.
    ELSE.
      WA_AGING-AGE_BUCKET = '4'.
      WA_AGING-BUCKET_TEXT = '90+ Days'.
    ENDIF.

    WA_AGING-COMPLAINT_COUNT = WA_AGING-COMPLAINT_COUNT + 1.

    IF WA_COMPLAINT-ESCALATED = 'X'.
      WA_AGING-ESCALATED_COUNT = WA_AGING-ESCALATED_COUNT + 1.
    ENDIF.

    COLLECT WA_AGING INTO AGING_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_AGING.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT AGING_TAB INTO WA_AGING.
    IF LV_TOTAL_COMPLAINTS > 0.
      WA_AGING-PERCENTAGE = ( WA_AGING-COMPLAINT_COUNT / LV_TOTAL_COMPLAINTS ) * 100.
      MODIFY AGING_TAB FROM WA_AGING.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT AGING_TAB BY AGE_BUCKET ASCENDING.
ENDFORM.

FORM GENERATE_COMPLAINT_REPORT.
  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_OVERVIEW.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_COMPLAINT_LIST.
  ELSEIF P_CATEGORY = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_CATEGORY_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_CUSTOMER = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_CUSTOMER_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_AGING = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_AGING_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_EXPORT = 'X'.
    PERFORM EXPORT_COMPLAINT_DATA.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_AUTO_RESPONSE = 'X'.
    PERFORM GENERATE_AUTO_RESPONSES.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_OVERVIEW.
  WRITE: / '=== Complaint Management Overview ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Total Complaints:', LV_TOTAL_COMPLAINTS,
         'Open:', LV_OPEN_COMPLAINTS,
         'Resolved:', LV_RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS,
         'Escalated:', LV_ESCALATED_COMPLAINTS.
  WRITE: / 'Average Resolution Days:', LV_AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS.
  ULINE.

  PERFORM DISPLAY_CATEGORY_ANALYSIS.
  SKIP.
  PERFORM DISPLAY_AGING_ANALYSIS.
  SKIP.
  PERFORM DISPLAY_CUSTOMER_ANALYSIS.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_CATEGORY_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Complaint Category Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Type', 'Description', 'Count', 'Open', 'Resolved', 'Escalated', 'Avg Days'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT CATEGORY_TAB INTO WA_CATEGORY.
    WRITE: / WA_CATEGORY-CATEGORY, WA_CATEGORY-CATEGORY_TEXT,
             WA_CATEGORY-COMPLAINT_COUNT,
             WA_CATEGORY-OPEN_COUNT,
             WA_CATEGORY-RESOLVED_COUNT,
             WA_CATEGORY-ESCALATED_COUNT,
             WA_CATEGORY-AVERAGE_RESOLUTION_DAYS.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_CUSTOMER_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Customer Complaint Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Customer', 'Name', 'Total', 'Open', 'Resolved', 'Escalated', 'Avg Days'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT CUST_SUM_TAB INTO WA_CUST_SUM.
    WRITE: / WA_CUST_SUM-KUNNR, WA_CUST_SUM-NAME1(15),
             WA_CUST_SUM-TOTAL_COMPLAINTS,
             WA_CUST_SUM-OPEN_COMPLAINTS,
             WA_CUST_SUM-RESOLVED_COMPLAINTS,
             WA_CUST_SUM-ESCALATED_COMPLAINTS,
             WA_CUST_SUM-AVG_RESOLUTION_DAYS.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_AGING_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Complaint Aging Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Age Bucket', 'Count', 'Escalated', 'Percentage'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT AGING_TAB INTO WA_AGING.
    WRITE: / WA_AGING-BUCKET_TEXT,
             WA_AGING-COMPLAINT_COUNT,
             WA_AGING-ESCALATED_COUNT,
             WA_AGING-PERCENTAGE, '%'.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_COMPLAINT_LIST.
  WRITE: / '=== Detailed Complaint List ==='.
  WRITE: / 'ID', 'Customer', 'Material', 'Type', 'Date', 'Priority', 'Status', 'Escalated'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT COMPLAINT_TAB INTO WA_COMPLAINT.
    WRITE: / WA_COMPLAINT-QMNUM, WA_COMPLAINT-KUNNR,
             WA_COMPLAINT-MATNR, WA_COMPLAINT-COMPLAINT_TEXT,
             WA_COMPLAINT-ERDAT, WA_COMPLAINT-PRIOK_TEXT,
             WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT,
             COND #( WHEN WA_COMPLAINT-ESCALATED = 'X' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' ).
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM GENERATE_AUTO_RESPONSES.
  DATA: LV_RESPONSE_COUNT TYPE I.

  LOOP AT COMPLAINT_TAB INTO WA_COMPLAINT
       WHERE STATUS_TEXT = 'Open' AND ESCALATED = ''.
    WA_COMPLAINT-RESPONSE_DATE = LV_CURRENT_DATE + 1.
    WA_COMPLAINT-RESPONSE_TEXT = 'We have received your complaint and are investigating. We will respond within 48 hours.'.
    WA_COMPLAINT-STATUS_TEXT = 'In Process'.
    MODIFY COMPLAINT_TAB FROM WA_COMPLAINT.
    LV_RESPONSE_COUNT = LV_RESPONSE_COUNT + 1.
  ENDLOOP.

  WRITE: / 'Auto-responses generated for', LV_RESPONSE_COUNT, 'complaints'.
ENDFORM.

FORM EXPORT_COMPLAINT_DATA.
  DATA: LV_FILENAME TYPE STRING.

  LV_FILENAME = 'COMPLAINT_DATA_' && SY-DATUM && '.csv'.

  CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      FILENAME = LV_FILENAME
      FILETYPE = 'ASC'
    TABLES
      DATA_TAB = COMPLAINT_TAB
    EXCEPTIONS
      OTHERS = 1.

  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    MESSAGE 'Complaint data exported successfully' TYPE 'S'.
  ELSE.
    MESSAGE 'Export failed' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

AT LINE-SELECTION.
  PERFORM DRILLDOWN_COMPLAINT_DETAILS.

FORM DRILLDOWN_COMPLAINT_DETAILS.
  READ TABLE COMPLAINT_TAB INTO WA_COMPLAINT INDEX SY-LISEL.
  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    SET PARAMETER ID 'IQM' FIELD WA_COMPLAINT-QMNUM.
    CALL TRANSACTION 'QM03' AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

output.program_summary: This customer complaint management report provides comprehensive tracking and analysis of customer complaints across quality, delivery, service, and billing categories. It is designed for customer service managers and quality teams to monitor complaint resolution, identify trends, and improve customer satisfaction.
output.logical_flow:
1. User selects complaints by complaint number, material, customer, plant, creation date, complaint type, and priority.
2. Complaint data is fetched from QMEL table with customer and material descriptions.
3. Sales order data is retrieved from VBAK/VBAP for complaint references.
4. Complaint categories are mapped: Q=Quality, D=Delivery, S=Service, B=Billing, O=Other.
5. Priority levels are mapped with text descriptions (Very High to Very Low).
6. Status is determined: Open, In Process, Resolved, Closed.
7. Escalation logic: complaints with priority 1 or 2 are automatically escalated.
8. Customer satisfaction score is calculated based on resolution days.
9. Multiple analysis views: Overview, Category, Customer, and Aging.
10. Aging analysis categorizes complaints by age buckets: 0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days.
11. Auto-response feature generates standard responses for open complaints.
12. Export functionality allows data extraction for further analysis.
13. Double-click navigates to transaction QM03 for detailed complaint display.
key_data_structures: COMPLAINT_STRUCTURE: Comprehensive complaint data with calculated metrics.
COMPLAINT_TAB: Main internal table storing all complaint records.
COMPLAINT_CATEGORY: Aggregated complaint data by category.
CATEGORY_TAB: Internal table for category analysis.
CUSTOMER_COMPLAINT_SUMMARY: Customer-level complaint aggregation.
CUST_SUM_TAB: Internal table for customer complaint analysis.
COMPLAINT_AGING: Age-based complaint analysis structure.
AGING_TAB: Internal table for complaint aging analysis.
output.technical_notes: The program uses QMEL as the main complaint table with QMART for complaint types. Priority mapping uses PRIOK field. Complaint status is determined from STATUS field. The aging analysis uses ERDAT (creation date) to calculate age buckets. Auto-response updates complaint status and assigns a response date. Customer satisfaction score is an inverse function of resolution days.

input:
REPORT Z_EMPLOYEE_TIMESHEET_ANALYSIS.

TABLES: PA0001, PA0002, PA0007, PA2001, PA2002, PA2003, T001P, T001.

DATA: BEGIN OF EMPLOYEE_STRUCTURE,
        PERNR LIKE PA0001-PERNR,
        ENAME LIKE PA0002-ENAME,
        VORNA LIKE PA0002-VORNA,
        GBDAT LIKE PA0002-GBDAT,
        GESCH LIKE PA0002-GESCH,
        WERKS LIKE PA0001-WERKS,
        PERSG LIKE PA0001-PERSG,
        PERSK LIKE PA0001-PERSK,
        ORGEH LIKE PA0001-ORGEH,
        KOSTL LIKE PA0001-KOSTL,
        PLANS LIKE PA0001-PLANS,
        STELL LIKE PA0001-STELL,
        EMPLOYMENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
        TERMINATION_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
        EMPLOYMENT_YEARS TYPE I,
        WORK_HOURS_PER_WEEK TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        STANDARD_HOURS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        OVERTIME_HOURS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        ABSENCE_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        VACATION_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        SICK_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        OTHER_ABSENCE_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_WORK_DAYS TYPE I,
        UTILIZATION_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        ATTENDANCE_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        OVERTIME_PERCENTAGE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        ABSENCE_PERCENTAGE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        YEAR_TO_DATE_HOURS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        MONTH_TO_DATE_HOURS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        DEPARTMENT TEXT20,
        JOB_TITLE TEXT30,
      END OF EMPLOYEE_STRUCTURE.

DATA: EMPLOYEE_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF EMPLOYEE_STRUCTURE,
      WA_EMPLOYEE LIKE EMPLOYEE_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF DEPARTMENT_SUMMARY,
        DEPT_ID LIKE PA0001-ORGEH,
        DEPT_NAME TEXT20,
        EMPLOYEE_COUNT TYPE I,
        TOTAL_HOURS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_OVERTIME TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        AVG_UTILIZATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        AVG_ATTENDANCE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        OVERTIME_RATIO TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        ABSENCE_RATIO TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF DEPARTMENT_SUMMARY.

DATA: DEPT_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF DEPARTMENT_SUMMARY,
      WA_DEPT LIKE DEPARTMENT_SUMMARY.

DATA: BEGIN OF MONTHLY_ANALYSIS,
        MONTH_YEAR TYPE CHAR6,
        TOTAL_HOURS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_OVERTIME TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_ABSENCE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        EMPLOYEE_AVG TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        OVERTIME_TREND TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF MONTHLY_ANALYSIS.

DATA: MONTHLY_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF MONTHLY_ANALYSIS,
      WA_MONTHLY LIKE MONTHLY_ANALYSIS.

DATA: BEGIN OF OVERTIME_ANALYSIS,
        PERNR LIKE PA0001-PERNR,
        ENAME LIKE PA0002-ENAME,
        WEEK_START TYPE SY-DATUM,
        WEEK_END TYPE SY-DATUM,
        REGULAR_HOURS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        OVERTIME_HOURS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_HOURS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        OVERTIME_REASON TYPE CHAR50,
      END OF OVERTIME_ANALYSIS.

DATA: OVERTIME_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF OVERTIME_ANALYSIS,
      WA_OVERTIME LIKE OVERTIME_ANALYSIS.

DATA: LV_TOTAL_EMPLOYEES TYPE I,
      LV_ACTIVE_EMPLOYEES TYPE I,
      LV_TERMINATED_EMPLOYEES TYPE I,
      LV_TOTAL_HOURS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_TOTAL_OVERTIME TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_GLOBAL_UTILIZATION TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_GLOBAL_ATTENDANCE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_CURRENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_START_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_END_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_COMPANY_NAME TYPE T001-BUTXT,
      LV_REPORT_PERIOD TYPE CHAR20.

SELECT-OPTIONS: S_PERNR FOR PA0001-PERNR,
                S_WERKS FOR PA0001-WERKS DEFAULT '1000',
                S_ORGEH FOR PA0001-ORGEH,
                S_PERSG FOR PA0001-PERSG,
                S_EMPLOYMENT FOR PA0001-BEGDA,
                S_TERMINATION FOR PA0001-ENDDA.

PARAMETERS: P_OVERVIEW RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA DEFAULT 'X',
            P_DEPARTMENT RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_MONTHLY RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_OVERTIME RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_ATTENDANCE RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_START_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM DEFAULT SY-DATUM,
            P_END_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM DEFAULT SY-DATUM,
            P_INCLUDE_TERMINATED AS CHECKBOX,
            P_DETAILED AS CHECKBOX,
            P_EXPORT AS CHECKBOX.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  LV_CURRENT_DATE = SY-DATUM.
  LV_START_DATE = P_START_DATE.
  LV_END_DATE = P_END_DATE.

  PERFORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  PERFORM FETCH_EMPLOYEE_DATA.
  PERFORM FETCH_ATTENDANCE_DATA.
  PERFORM FETCH_ABSENCE_DATA.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_EMPLOYEE_METRICS.
  PERFORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  PERFORM GENERATE_TIMESHEET_REPORT.

TOP-OF-PAGE.
  WRITE: / 'Employee Timesheet Analysis Report',
         / 'Company:', LV_COMPANY_NAME,
         / 'Period:', LV_START_DATE, 'to', LV_END_DATE,
         / 'Generated:', SY-DATUM, 'Time:', SY-UZEIT.
  ULINE.

FORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  SELECT SINGLE BUTXT FROM T001 INTO LV_COMPANY_NAME
    WHERE BUKRS = S_WERKS-LOW.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_EMPLOYEE_DATA.
  SELECT A~PERNR A~WERKS A~PERSG A~PERSK A~ORGEH A~KOSTL A~PLANS A~STELL
         A~BEGDA A~ENDDA
         B~ENAME B~VORNA B~GBDAT B~GESCH
    FROM PA0001 AS A
    INNER JOIN PA0002 AS B ON A~PERNR = B~PERNR
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE EMPLOYEE_TAB
    WHERE A~PERNR IN S_PERNR
      AND A~WERKS IN S_WERKS
      AND A~ORGEH IN S_ORGEH
      AND A~PERSG IN S_PERSG
      AND A~BEGDA IN S_EMPLOYMENT
      AND A~ENDDA IN S_TERMINATION.

  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'No employees found for the selection' TYPE 'W'.
    STOP.
  ENDIF.

  LOOP AT EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE.
    WA_EMPLOYEE-EMPLOYMENT_DATE = WA_EMPLOYEE-BEGDA.
    WA_EMPLOYEE-TERMINATION_DATE = WA_EMPLOYEE-ENDDA.
    WA_EMPLOYEE-EMPLOYMENT_YEARS = ( WA_EMPLOYEE-ENDDA - WA_EMPLOYEE-BEGDA ) / 365.

    IF WA_EMPLOYEE-ENDDA = '99991231' OR P_INCLUDE_TERMINATED = 'X'.
      WA_EMPLOYEE-EMPLOYMENT_YEARS = ( LV_CURRENT_DATE - WA_EMPLOYEE-BEGDA ) / 365.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT SINGLE TEXT30 FROM T001P INTO WA_EMPLOYEE-DEPARTMENT
      WHERE WERKS = WA_EMPLOYEE-WERKS
        AND ORGEH = WA_EMPLOYEE-ORGEH.

    SELECT SINGLE TEXT30 FROM T001P INTO WA_EMPLOYEE-JOB_TITLE
      WHERE WERKS = WA_EMPLOYEE-WERKS
        AND PLANS = WA_EMPLOYEE-PLANS.

    MODIFY EMPLOYEE_TAB FROM WA_EMPLOYEE.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_ATTENDANCE_DATA.
  LOOP AT EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE.
    SELECT SUM( SOWE ) AS WORK_HOURS
      FROM PA2001
      INTO @DATA(LV_WORK_HOURS)
      WHERE PERNR = WA_EMPLOYEE-PERNR
        AND BEGDA >= LV_START_DATE
        AND BEGDA <= LV_END_DATE.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_EMPLOYEE-WORK_HOURS_PER_WEEK = LV_WORK_HOURS / 4.33.
      WA_EMPLOYEE-TOTAL_WORK_DAYS = WA_EMPLOYEE-TOTAL_WORK_DAYS + 1.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT SUM( SOWE ) AS OVERTIME
      FROM PA2001
      INTO @DATA(LV_OVERTIME)
      WHERE PERNR = WA_EMPLOYEE-PERNR
        AND BEGDA >= LV_START_DATE
        AND BEGDA <= LV_END_DATE
        AND STDAZ > 0.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_EMPLOYEE-OVERTIME_HOURS = LV_OVERTIME.
    ENDIF.

    WA_EMPLOYEE-STANDARD_HOURS = 40.
    WA_EMPLOYEE-UTILIZATION_RATE = ( WA_EMPLOYEE-WORK_HOURS_PER_WEEK / WA_EMPLOYEE-STANDARD_HOURS ) * 100.
    WA_EMPLOYEE-OVERTIME_PERCENTAGE = ( WA_EMPLOYEE-OVERTIME_HOURS / WA_EMPLOYEE-STANDARD_HOURS ) * 100.

    MODIFY EMPLOYEE_TAB FROM WA_EMPLOYEE.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_ABSENCE_DATA.
  LOOP AT EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE.
    SELECT SUM( ANZHL ) AS ABSENCE_HOURS
      FROM PA2001
      INTO @DATA(LV_ABSENCE_HOURS)
      WHERE PERNR = WA_EMPLOYEE-PERNR
        AND BEGDA >= LV_START_DATE
        AND BEGDA <= LV_END_DATE
        AND AWART BETWEEN '0100' AND '0199'.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_EMPLOYEE-ABSENCE_DAYS = LV_ABSENCE_HOURS / 8.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT SUM( ANZHL ) AS VACATION_HOURS
      FROM PA2001
      INTO @DATA(LV_VACATION_HOURS)
      WHERE PERNR = WA_EMPLOYEE-PERNR
        AND BEGDA >= LV_START_DATE
        AND BEGDA <= LV_END_DATE
        AND AWART = '0200'.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_EMPLOYEE-VACATION_DAYS = LV_VACATION_HOURS / 8.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT SUM( ANZHL ) AS SICK_HOURS
      FROM PA2001
      INTO @DATA(LV_SICK_HOURS)
      WHERE PERNR = WA_EMPLOYEE-PERNR
        AND BEGDA >= LV_START_DATE
        AND BEGDA <= LV_END_DATE
        AND AWART = '0300'.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_EMPLOYEE-SICK_DAYS = LV_SICK_HOURS / 8.
    ENDIF.

    WA_EMPLOYEE-OTHER_ABSENCE_DAYS = WA_EMPLOYEE-ABSENCE_DAYS - WA_EMPLOYEE-VACATION_DAYS - WA_EMPLOYEE-SICK_DAYS.

    IF WA_EMPLOYEE-TOTAL_WORK_DAYS > 0.
      WA_EMPLOYEE-ATTENDANCE_RATE = ( 1 - WA_EMPLOYEE-ABSENCE_DAYS / WA_EMPLOYEE-TOTAL_WORK_DAYS ) * 100.
      WA_EMPLOYEE-ABSENCE_PERCENTAGE = ( WA_EMPLOYEE-ABSENCE_DAYS / WA_EMPLOYEE-TOTAL_WORK_DAYS ) * 100.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY EMPLOYEE_TAB FROM WA_EMPLOYEE.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_EMPLOYEE_METRICS.
  LOOP AT EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE.
    WA_EMPLOYEE-YEAR_TO_DATE_HOURS = WA_EMPLOYEE-WORK_HOURS_PER_WEEK * 52.
    WA_EMPLOYEE-MONTH_TO_DATE_HOURS = WA_EMPLOYEE-WORK_HOURS_PER_WEEK * 4.33.
    MODIFY EMPLOYEE_TAB FROM WA_EMPLOYEE.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X' OR P_DEPARTMENT = 'X'.
    PERFORM DEPARTMENT_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X' OR P_MONTHLY = 'X'.
    PERFORM MONTHLY_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X' OR P_OVERTIME = 'X'.
    PERFORM OVERTIME_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM DEPARTMENT_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE.
    WA_DEPT-DEPT_ID = WA_EMPLOYEE-ORGEH.
    WA_DEPT-DEPT_NAME = WA_EMPLOYEE-DEPARTMENT.
    WA_DEPT-EMPLOYEE_COUNT = WA_DEPT-EMPLOYEE_COUNT + 1.
    WA_DEPT-TOTAL_HOURS = WA_DEPT-TOTAL_HOURS + WA_EMPLOYEE-WORK_HOURS_PER_WEEK.
    WA_DEPT-TOTAL_OVERTIME = WA_DEPT-TOTAL_OVERTIME + WA_EMPLOYEE-OVERTIME_HOURS.
    WA_DEPT-TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS = WA_DEPT-TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS + WA_EMPLOYEE-ABSENCE_DAYS.
    WA_DEPT-AVG_UTILIZATION = WA_DEPT-AVG_UTILIZATION + WA_EMPLOYEE-UTILIZATION_RATE.
    WA_DEPT-AVG_ATTENDANCE = WA_DEPT-AVG_ATTENDANCE + WA_EMPLOYEE-ATTENDANCE_RATE.

    COLLECT WA_DEPT INTO DEPT_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_DEPT.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT DEPT_TAB INTO WA_DEPT.
    IF WA_DEPT-EMPLOYEE_COUNT > 0.
      WA_DEPT-AVG_UTILIZATION = WA_DEPT-AVG_UTILIZATION / WA_DEPT-EMPLOYEE_COUNT.
      WA_DEPT-AVG_ATTENDANCE = WA_DEPT-AVG_ATTENDANCE / WA_DEPT-EMPLOYEE_COUNT.
      WA_DEPT-OVERTIME_RATIO = WA_DEPT-TOTAL_OVERTIME / WA_DEPT-TOTAL_HOURS * 100.
      WA_DEPT-ABSENCE_RATIO = WA_DEPT-TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS / WA_DEPT-EMPLOYEE_COUNT.
      MODIFY DEPT_TAB FROM WA_DEPT.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM MONTHLY_ANALYSIS.
  DATA: LV_MONTH_START TYPE SY-DATUM,
        LV_MONTH_END TYPE SY-DATUM,
        LV_EMP_COUNT TYPE I.

  DO 6 TIMES.
    LV_MONTH_START = LV_START_DATE.
    LV_MONTH_END = LV_START_DATE + 30.

    WA_MONTHLY-MONTH_YEAR = LV_MONTH_START+0(6).
    WA_MONTHLY-EMPLOYEE_AVG = 0.
    LV_EMP_COUNT = 0.

    LOOP AT EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE.
      IF WA_EMPLOYEE-BEGDA <= LV_MONTH_END AND WA_EMPLOYEE-ENDDA >= LV_MONTH_START.
        WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_HOURS = WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_HOURS + WA_EMPLOYEE-WORK_HOURS_PER_WEEK.
        WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_OVERTIME = WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_OVERTIME + WA_EMPLOYEE-OVERTIME_HOURS.
        WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_ABSENCE = WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_ABSENCE + WA_EMPLOYEE-ABSENCE_DAYS.
        LV_EMP_COUNT = LV_EMP_COUNT + 1.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

    IF LV_EMP_COUNT > 0.
      WA_MONTHLY-EMPLOYEE_AVG = WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_HOURS / LV_EMP_COUNT.
      WA_MONTHLY-OVERTIME_TREND = WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_OVERTIME / WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_HOURS * 100.
    ENDIF.

    APPEND WA_MONTHLY TO MONTHLY_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_MONTHLY.
    LV_START_DATE = LV_MONTH_END + 1.
  ENDDO.
ENDFORM.

FORM OVERTIME_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE.
    WA_OVERTIME-PERNR = WA_EMPLOYEE-PERNR.
    WA_OVERTIME-ENAME = WA_EMPLOYEE-ENAME.
    WA_OVERTIME-REGULAR_HOURS = WA_EMPLOYEE-STANDARD_HOURS.
    WA_OVERTIME-OVERTIME_HOURS = WA_EMPLOYEE-OVERTIME_HOURS.
    WA_OVERTIME-TOTAL_HOURS = WA_EMPLOYEE-WORK_HOURS_PER_WEEK.

    IF WA_EMPLOYEE-OVERTIME_HOURS > 10.
      WA_OVERTIME-OVERTIME_REASON = 'High workload - Consider hiring'.
    ELSEIF WA_EMPLOYEE-OVERTIME_HOURS > 5.
      WA_OVERTIME-OVERTIME_REASON = 'Moderate overtime - Monitor'.
    ELSE.
      WA_OVERTIME-OVERTIME_REASON = 'Normal workload'.
    ENDIF.

    APPEND WA_OVERTIME TO OVERTIME_TAB.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT OVERTIME_TAB BY OVERTIME_HOURS DESCENDING.
ENDFORM.

FORM GENERATE_TIMESHEET_REPORT.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_GLOBAL_STATISTICS.

  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_OVERVIEW.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_DEPARTMENT_SUMMARY.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_OVERTIME_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_DEPARTMENT = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_DEPARTMENT_SUMMARY.
  ELSEIF P_MONTHLY = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_MONTHLY_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_OVERTIME = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_OVERTIME_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_ATTENDANCE = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_ATTENDANCE_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_DETAILED = 'X'.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_EMPLOYEE_DETAILS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_EXPORT = 'X'.
    PERFORM EXPORT_TIMESHEET_DATA.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_GLOBAL_STATISTICS.
  LV_TOTAL_EMPLOYEES = LINES( EMPLOYEE_TAB ).
  LV_ACTIVE_EMPLOYEES = 0.
  LV_TERMINATED_EMPLOYEES = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_HOURS = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_OVERTIME = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS = 0.

  LOOP AT EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE.
    IF WA_EMPLOYEE-ENDDA = '99991231'.
      LV_ACTIVE_EMPLOYEES = LV_ACTIVE_EMPLOYEES + 1.
    ELSE.
      LV_TERMINATED_EMPLOYEES = LV_TERMINATED_EMPLOYEES + 1.
    ENDIF.

    LV_TOTAL_HOURS = LV_TOTAL_HOURS + WA_EMPLOYEE-WORK_HOURS_PER_WEEK.
    LV_TOTAL_OVERTIME = LV_TOTAL_OVERTIME + WA_EMPLOYEE-OVERTIME_HOURS.
    LV_TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS = LV_TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS + WA_EMPLOYEE-ABSENCE_DAYS.
  ENDLOOP.

  IF LV_TOTAL_EMPLOYEES > 0.
    LV_GLOBAL_UTILIZATION = ( LV_TOTAL_HOURS / ( LV_TOTAL_EMPLOYEES * 40 ) ) * 100.
    LV_GLOBAL_ATTENDANCE = ( 1 - LV_TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS / ( LV_TOTAL_EMPLOYEES * 260 ) ) * 100.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_OVERVIEW.
  WRITE: / '=== Timesheet Overview ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Total Employees:', LV_TOTAL_EMPLOYEES,
         'Active:', LV_ACTIVE_EMPLOYEES,
         'Terminated:', LV_TERMINATED_EMPLOYEES.
  WRITE: / 'Total Hours (Weekly):', LV_TOTAL_HOURS,
         'Overtime:', LV_TOTAL_OVERTIME,
         'Absence Days:', LV_TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS.
  WRITE: / 'Global Utilization:', LV_GLOBAL_UTILIZATION, '%',
         'Attendance Rate:', LV_GLOBAL_ATTENDANCE, '%'.
  ULINE.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_DEPARTMENT_SUMMARY.
  WRITE: / '=== Department Summary ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Department', 'Employees', 'Hours', 'Overtime',
           'Absence', 'Utilization %', 'Attendance %'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT DEPT_TAB INTO WA_DEPT.
    WRITE: / WA_DEPT-DEPT_NAME(20),
             WA_DEPT-EMPLOYEE_COUNT,
             WA_DEPT-TOTAL_HOURS,
             WA_DEPT-TOTAL_OVERTIME,
             WA_DEPT-TOTAL_ABSENCE_DAYS,
             WA_DEPT-AVG_UTILIZATION,
             WA_DEPT-AVG_ATTENDANCE.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_MONTHLY_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Monthly Trends ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Month', 'Total Hours', 'Overtime', 'Absence',
           'Avg Hours/Employee', 'Overtime %'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT MONTHLY_TAB INTO WA_MONTHLY.
    WRITE: / WA_MONTHLY-MONTH_YEAR,
             WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_HOURS,
             WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_OVERTIME,
             WA_MONTHLY-TOTAL_ABSENCE,
             WA_MONTHLY-EMPLOYEE_AVG,
             WA_MONTHLY-OVERTIME_TREND.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_OVERTIME_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Overtime Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Employee', 'Name', 'Regular Hrs', 'OT Hrs',
           'Total Hrs', 'Reason'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT OVERTIME_TAB INTO WA_OVERTIME.
    WRITE: / WA_OVERTIME-PERNR, WA_OVERTIME-ENAME(15),
             WA_OVERTIME-REGULAR_HOURS,
             WA_OVERTIME-OVERTIME_HOURS,
             WA_OVERTIME-TOTAL_HOURS,
             WA_OVERTIME-OVERTIME_REASON(30).
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_ATTENDANCE_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Attendance Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Employee', 'Name', 'Work Days', 'Absence',
           'Vacation', 'Sick', 'Attendance %'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE.
    WRITE: / WA_EMPLOYEE-PERNR, WA_EMPLOYEE-ENAME(15),
             WA_EMPLOYEE-TOTAL_WORK_DAYS,
             WA_EMPLOYEE-ABSENCE_DAYS,
             WA_EMPLOYEE-VACATION_DAYS,
             WA_EMPLOYEE-SICK_DAYS,
             WA_EMPLOYEE-ATTENDANCE_RATE.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_EMPLOYEE_DETAILS.
  WRITE: / '=== Employee Details ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Employee', 'Department', 'Job Title', 'Hours', 'OT', 'Util %'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE.
    WRITE: / WA_EMPLOYEE-PERNR, WA_EMPLOYEE-DEPARTMENT(15),
             WA_EMPLOYEE-JOB_TITLE(20),
             WA_EMPLOYEE-WORK_HOURS_PER_WEEK,
             WA_EMPLOYEE-OVERTIME_HOURS,
             WA_EMPLOYEE-UTILIZATION_RATE.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM EXPORT_TIMESHEET_DATA.
  DATA: LV_FILENAME TYPE STRING.

  LV_FILENAME = 'TIMESHEET_' && SY-DATUM && '.csv'.

  CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      FILENAME = LV_FILENAME
      FILETYPE = 'ASC'
    TABLES
      DATA_TAB = EMPLOYEE_TAB
    EXCEPTIONS
      OTHERS = 1.

  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    MESSAGE 'Timesheet data exported successfully' TYPE 'S'.
  ELSE.
    MESSAGE 'Export failed' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

AT LINE-SELECTION.
  PERFORM DRILLDOWN_EMPLOYEE_DETAILS.

FORM DRILLDOWN_EMPLOYEE_DETAILS.
  READ TABLE EMPLOYEE_TAB INTO WA_EMPLOYEE INDEX SY-LISEL.
  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    SET PARAMETER ID 'PER' FIELD WA_EMPLOYEE-PERNR.
    CALL TRANSACTION 'PA20' AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

output.program_summary: This employee timesheet analysis report provides comprehensive workforce analytics including attendance, overtime, and absence patterns. It is designed for HR managers, payroll teams, and department heads to monitor employee productivity, identify overtime trends, and manage workforce utilization effectively.
output.logical_flow:
1. User selects employees by personnel number, company code, organizational unit, employment type, and employment/termination dates.
2. Employee master data is fetched from PA0001 (organizational assignment) and PA0002 (personal data).
3. Attendance data is retrieved from PA2001 with calculated work hours and overtime.
4. Absence data is categorized from PA2001 by absence types: vacation (0200), sick (0300), and other (0100-0199).
5. Key metrics calculated: utilization rate, attendance rate, overtime percentage, and absence percentage.
6. Department analysis aggregates data by organizational unit with departmental KPIs.
7. Monthly analysis tracks trends over a 6-month period.
8. Overtime analysis identifies employees with excessive overtime and provides recommendations.
9. Attendance analysis displays absence breakdown by type.
10. Multiple view options: Overview, Department, Monthly, Overtime, Attendance.
11. Detailed view displays employee-level metrics.
12. Export functionality allows data extraction for external reporting.
13. Double-click navigates to transaction PA20 for employee master display.
key_data_structures: EMPLOYEE_STRUCTURE: Comprehensive employee data with attendance, overtime, and absence metrics.
EMPLOYEE_TAB: Main internal table storing all employee timesheet data.
DEPARTMENT_SUMMARY: Aggregated department-level workforce analytics.
DEPT_TAB: Internal table for department analysis.
MONTHLY_ANALYSIS: Monthly trend analysis structure.
MONTHLY_TAB: Internal table for monthly workforce trends.
OVERTIME_ANALYSIS: Overtime analysis structure with employee-level detail.
OVERTIME_TAB: Internal table for overtime analysis.
output.technical_notes: The program uses PA2001 for attendance and absence data with AWART (absence type) categorization. Standard work hours are assumed to be 40 per week. Absence hours are converted to days using an 8-hour workday. The COLLECT statement aggregates data by department and monthly analysis uses a 6-month rolling window. Overtime recommendations are based on threshold levels (>10 hours, >5 hours).

input:
REPORT Z_BILLING_DOCUMENT_MONITOR.

TABLES: VBRK, VBRP, KNA1, MARA, T001, T001W, T003T.

DATA: BEGIN OF BILLING_STRUCTURE,
        VBELN LIKE VBRK-VBELN,
        FKART LIKE VBRK-FKART,
        FKTYP LIKE VBRK-FKTYP,
        BELNR LIKE VBRK-BELNR,
        KUNAG LIKE VBRK-KUNAG,
        NAME1 LIKE KNA1-NAME1,
        BUKRS LIKE VBRK-BUKRS,
        WAERK LIKE VBRK-WAERK,
        NETWR LIKE VBRK-NETWR,
        MWSBK LIKE VBRK-MWSBK,
        BRUTTO LIKE VBRK-BRUTTO,
        FKDAT LIKE VBRK-FKDAT,
        ERNAM LIKE VBRK-ERNAM,
        ERDAT LIKE VBRK-ERDAT,
        ERZET LIKE VBRK-ERZET,
        FBUDA LIKE VBRK-FBUDA,
        VSBED LIKE VBRK-VSBED,
        VBELN_REF LIKE VBRK-VBELN,
        RFBSK LIKE VBRK-RFBSK,
        STATUS_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        POSNR LIKE VBRP-POSNR,
        MATNR LIKE VBRP-MATNR,
        MAKTX LIKE MARA-MAKTX,
        FKIMG LIKE VBRP-FKIMG,
        VRKME LIKE VBRP-VRKME,
        NETPR LIKE VBRP-NETPR,
        NETWR_ITEM LIKE VBRP-NETWR,
        MWSBP LIKE VBRP-MWSBP,
        BWTAR LIKE VBRP-BWTAR,
        SHKZG LIKE VBRP-SHKZG,
        LINE_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        DISCOUNT_AMOUNT TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TAX_AMOUNT TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        PAYMENT_TERMS TYPE CHAR4,
        DUNNING_LEVEL TYPE I,
        OVERDUE_DAYS TYPE I,
      END OF BILLING_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BILLING_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF BILLING_STRUCTURE,
      WA_BILLING LIKE BILLING_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF CUSTOMER_BILLING_SUMMARY,
        KUNAG LIKE VBRK-KUNAG,
        NAME1 LIKE KNA1-NAME1,
        TOTAL_INVOICES TYPE I,
        TOTAL_CREDIT_MEMOS TYPE I,
        TOTAL_NET_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        AVG_INVOICE_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        OPEN_AMOUNT TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        PAID_AMOUNT TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        OUTSTANDING_RATIO TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF CUSTOMER_BILLING_SUMMARY.

DATA: CUST_BILL_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF CUSTOMER_BILLING_SUMMARY,
      WA_CUST_BILL LIKE CUSTOMER_BILLING_SUMMARY.

DATA: BEGIN OF BILLING_AGING,
        AGE_BUCKET TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        BUCKET_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        DOCUMENT_COUNT TYPE I,
        TOTAL_AMOUNT TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        PERCENTAGE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        CUSTOMER_COUNT TYPE I,
      END OF BILLING_AGING.

DATA: AGING_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF BILLING_AGING,
      WA_AGING LIKE BILLING_AGING.

DATA: BEGIN OF MATERIAL_BILLING_ANALYSIS,
        MATNR LIKE VBRP-MATNR,
        MAKTX LIKE MARA-MAKTX,
        TOTAL_BILLED_QTY TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        TOTAL_BILLED_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        AVG_PRICE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        REVENUE_RANK TYPE I,
      END OF MATERIAL_BILLING_ANALYSIS.

DATA: MAT_BILL_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF MATERIAL_BILLING_ANALYSIS,
      WA_MAT_BILL LIKE MATERIAL_BILLING_ANALYSIS.

DATA: LV_TOTAL_DOCUMENTS TYPE I,
      LV_TOTAL_INVOICES TYPE I,
      LV_TOTAL_CREDIT_MEMOS TYPE I,
      LV_TOTAL_NET_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_OVERDUE_DOCUMENTS TYPE I,
      LV_OVERDUE_AMOUNT TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_AVG_DAYS_OVERDUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_CURRENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_START_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_END_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_COMPANY_NAME TYPE T001-BUTXT,
      LV_30_DAYS_AGO TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_60_DAYS_AGO TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_90_DAYS_AGO TYPE SY-DATUM.

SELECT-OPTIONS: S_VBELN FOR VBRK-VBELN,
                S_KUNAG FOR VBRK-KUNAG,
                S_MATNR FOR VBRP-MATNR,
                S_BUKRS FOR VBRK-BUKRS DEFAULT '1000',
                S_FKDAT FOR VBRK-FKDAT DEFAULT SY-DATUM,
                S_FKART FOR VBRK-FKART,
                S_RFBSK FOR VBRK-RFBSK.

PARAMETERS: P_OVERVIEW RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA DEFAULT 'X',
            P_CUSTOMER RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_AGING RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_MATERIAL RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_OVERDUE RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_DUE_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
            P_DAYS_OVERDUE TYPE I DEFAULT 30,
            P_EXPORT AS CHECKBOX,
            P_DETAILED AS CHECKBOX.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  LV_CURRENT_DATE = SY-DATUM.
  LV_START_DATE = S_FKDAT-LOW.
  LV_END_DATE = S_FKDAT-HIGH.
  LV_30_DAYS_AGO = LV_CURRENT_DATE - 30.
  LV_60_DAYS_AGO = LV_CURRENT_DATE - 60.
  LV_90_DAYS_AGO = LV_CURRENT_DATE - 90.

  PERFORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  PERFORM FETCH_BILLING_DATA.
  PERFORM FETCH_ITEM_DATA.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_BILLING_METRICS.
  PERFORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  PERFORM GENERATE_BILLING_REPORT.

TOP-OF-PAGE.
  WRITE: / 'Billing Document Monitoring Report',
         / 'Company:', LV_COMPANY_NAME,
         / 'Period:', LV_START_DATE, 'to', LV_END_DATE,
         / 'Generated:', SY-DATUM, 'Time:', SY-UZEIT.
  ULINE.

FORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  SELECT SINGLE BUTXT FROM T001 INTO LV_COMPANY_NAME
    WHERE BUKRS = S_BUKRS-LOW.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_BILLING_DATA.
  SELECT A~VBELN A~FKART A~FKTYP A~BELNR A~KUNAG A~BUKRS A~WAERK
         A~NETWR A~MWSBK A~BRUTTO A~FKDAT A~ERNAM A~ERDAT A~ERZET
         A~FBUDA A~VSBED A~VBELN_REF A~RFBSK
         B~NAME1
    FROM VBRK AS A
    INNER JOIN KNA1 AS B ON A~KUNAG = B~KUNNR
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE BILLING_TAB
    WHERE A~VBELN IN S_VBELN
      AND A~KUNAG IN S_KUNAG
      AND A~BUKRS IN S_BUKRS
      AND A~FKDAT IN S_FKDAT
      AND A~FKART IN S_FKART
      AND A~RFBSK IN S_RFBSK.

  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'No billing documents found for the selection' TYPE 'W'.
    STOP.
  ENDIF.

  LOOP AT BILLING_TAB INTO WA_BILLING.
    IF WA_BILLING-RFBSK = 'A'.
      WA_BILLING-STATUS_TEXT = 'Approved'.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-RFBSK = 'B'.
      WA_BILLING-STATUS_TEXT = 'Blocked'.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-RFBSK = 'C'.
      WA_BILLING-STATUS_TEXT = 'Cleared'.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-RFBSK = 'D'.
      WA_BILLING-STATUS_TEXT = 'Cleared/Not Yet Due'.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-RFBSK = 'E'.
      WA_BILLING-STATUS_TEXT = 'Not Yet Due'.
    ELSE.
      WA_BILLING-STATUS_TEXT = 'Unknown'.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_BILLING-FBUDA < LV_CURRENT_DATE.
      WA_BILLING-OVERDUE_DAYS = LV_CURRENT_DATE - WA_BILLING-FBUDA.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY BILLING_TAB FROM WA_BILLING.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_ITEM_DATA.
  LOOP AT BILLING_TAB INTO WA_BILLING.
    SELECT A~POSNR A~MATNR A~FKIMG A~VRKME A~NETPR A~NETWR A~MWSBP
           A~BWTAR A~SHKZG
           B~MAKTX
      FROM VBRP AS A
      INNER JOIN MARA AS B ON A~MATNR = B~MATNR
      INTO TABLE @DATA(ITEM_TAB)
      WHERE A~VBELN = WA_BILLING-VBELN.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      LOOP AT ITEM_TAB INTO DATA(WA_ITEM).
        WA_BILLING-MATNR = WA_ITEM-MATNR.
        WA_BILLING-MAKTX = WA_ITEM-MAKTX.
        WA_BILLING-FKIMG = WA_ITEM-FKIMG.
        WA_BILLING-VRKME = WA_ITEM-VRKME.
        WA_BILLING-NETPR = WA_ITEM-NETPR.
        WA_BILLING-NETWR_ITEM = WA_ITEM-NETWR.
        WA_BILLING-MWSBP = WA_ITEM-MWSBP.

        WA_BILLING-LINE_VALUE = WA_ITEM-FKIMG * WA_ITEM-NETPR.
        WA_BILLING-TAX_AMOUNT = WA_ITEM-MWSBP.

        IF WA_ITEM-SHKZG = 'S'.
          WA_BILLING-DISCOUNT_AMOUNT = WA_ITEM-NETWR * 0.05.
        ENDIF.

        APPEND WA_BILLING TO BILLING_TAB.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_BILLING_METRICS.
  LOOP AT BILLING_TAB INTO WA_BILLING.
    WA_BILLING-PAYMENT_TERMS = '001'.
    WA_BILLING-DUNNING_LEVEL = 0.

    IF WA_BILLING-OVERDUE_DAYS > 30.
      WA_BILLING-DUNNING_LEVEL = 1.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-OVERDUE_DAYS > 60.
      WA_BILLING-DUNNING_LEVEL = 2.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-OVERDUE_DAYS > 90.
      WA_BILLING-DUNNING_LEVEL = 3.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY BILLING_TAB FROM WA_BILLING.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X' OR P_CUSTOMER = 'X'.
    PERFORM CUSTOMER_BILLING_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X' OR P_AGING = 'X'.
    PERFORM BILLING_AGING_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X' OR P_MATERIAL = 'X'.
    PERFORM MATERIAL_BILLING_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM CUSTOMER_BILLING_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT BILLING_TAB INTO WA_BILLING.
    WA_CUST_BILL-KUNAG = WA_BILLING-KUNAG.
    WA_CUST_BILL-NAME1 = WA_BILLING-NAME1.

    IF WA_BILLING-FKTYP = 'A'.
      WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_INVOICES = WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_INVOICES + 1.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-FKTYP = 'B'.
      WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_CREDIT_MEMOS = WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_CREDIT_MEMOS + 1.
    ENDIF.

    WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_NET_VALUE = WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_NET_VALUE + WA_BILLING-NETWR.
    WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT = WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT + WA_BILLING-MWSBK.
    WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE = WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE + WA_BILLING-BRUTTO.

    IF WA_BILLING-RFBSK = 'A' OR WA_BILLING-RFBSK = 'E'.
      WA_CUST_BILL-OPEN_AMOUNT = WA_CUST_BILL-OPEN_AMOUNT + WA_BILLING-BRUTTO.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-RFBSK = 'C'.
      WA_CUST_BILL-PAID_AMOUNT = WA_CUST_BILL-PAID_AMOUNT + WA_BILLING-BRUTTO.
    ENDIF.

    COLLECT WA_CUST_BILL INTO CUST_BILL_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_CUST_BILL.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT CUST_BILL_TAB INTO WA_CUST_BILL.
    IF WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_INVOICES > 0.
      WA_CUST_BILL-AVG_INVOICE_VALUE = WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_NET_VALUE / WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_INVOICES.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE > 0.
      WA_CUST_BILL-OUTSTANDING_RATIO = ( WA_CUST_BILL-OPEN_AMOUNT / WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE ) * 100.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY CUST_BILL_TAB FROM WA_CUST_BILL.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT CUST_BILL_TAB BY TOTAL_NET_VALUE DESCENDING.
ENDFORM.

FORM BILLING_AGING_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT BILLING_TAB INTO WA_BILLING.
    IF WA_BILLING-FBUDA >= LV_30_DAYS_AGO.
      WA_AGING-AGE_BUCKET = '1'.
      WA_AGING-BUCKET_TEXT = 'Current'.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-FBUDA >= LV_60_DAYS_AGO.
      WA_AGING-AGE_BUCKET = '2'.
      WA_AGING-BUCKET_TEXT = '31-60 Days'.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-FBUDA >= LV_90_DAYS_AGO.
      WA_AGING-AGE_BUCKET = '3'.
      WA_AGING-BUCKET_TEXT = '61-90 Days'.
    ELSE.
      WA_AGING-AGE_BUCKET = '4'.
      WA_AGING-BUCKET_TEXT = '90+ Days'.
    ENDIF.

    WA_AGING-DOCUMENT_COUNT = WA_AGING-DOCUMENT_COUNT + 1.
    WA_AGING-TOTAL_AMOUNT = WA_AGING-TOTAL_AMOUNT + WA_BILLING-BRUTTO.

    COLLECT WA_AGING INTO AGING_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_AGING.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT AGING_TAB INTO WA_AGING.
    WA_AGING-PERCENTAGE = ( WA_AGING-TOTAL_AMOUNT / LV_TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE ) * 100.
    MODIFY AGING_TAB FROM WA_AGING.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT AGING_TAB BY AGE_BUCKET ASCENDING.
ENDFORM.

FORM MATERIAL_BILLING_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT BILLING_TAB INTO WA_BILLING.
    WA_MAT_BILL-MATNR = WA_BILLING-MATNR.
    WA_MAT_BILL-MAKTX = WA_BILLING-MAKTX.
    WA_MAT_BILL-TOTAL_BILLED_QTY = WA_MAT_BILL-TOTAL_BILLED_QTY + WA_BILLING-FKIMG.
    WA_MAT_BILL-TOTAL_BILLED_VALUE = WA_MAT_BILL-TOTAL_BILLED_VALUE + WA_BILLING-NETWR_ITEM.

    COLLECT WA_MAT_BILL INTO MAT_BILL_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_MAT_BILL.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT MAT_BILL_TAB INTO WA_MAT_BILL.
    IF WA_MAT_BILL-TOTAL_BILLED_QTY > 0.
      WA_MAT_BILL-AVG_PRICE = WA_MAT_BILL-TOTAL_BILLED_VALUE / WA_MAT_BILL-TOTAL_BILLED_QTY.
    ENDIF.
    MODIFY MAT_BILL_TAB FROM WA_MAT_BILL.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT MAT_BILL_TAB BY TOTAL_BILLED_VALUE DESCENDING.

  LOOP AT MAT_BILL_TAB INTO WA_MAT_BILL.
    WA_MAT_BILL-REVENUE_RANK = SY-TABIX.
    MODIFY MAT_BILL_TAB FROM WA_MAT_BILL.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM GENERATE_BILLING_REPORT.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_GLOBAL_STATISTICS.

  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_OVERVIEW.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_CUSTOMER_ANALYSIS.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_AGING_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_CUSTOMER = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_CUSTOMER_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_AGING = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_AGING_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_MATERIAL = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_MATERIAL_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_OVERDUE = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_OVERDUE_DOCUMENTS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_DETAILED = 'X'.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_DETAILED_BILLING_LIST.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_EXPORT = 'X'.
    PERFORM EXPORT_BILLING_DATA.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_GLOBAL_STATISTICS.
  LV_TOTAL_DOCUMENTS = LINES( BILLING_TAB ).
  LV_TOTAL_INVOICES = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_CREDIT_MEMOS = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_NET_VALUE = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE = 0.
  LV_OVERDUE_DOCUMENTS = 0.
  LV_OVERDUE_AMOUNT = 0.
  LV_AVG_DAYS_OVERDUE = 0.

  LOOP AT BILLING_TAB INTO WA_BILLING.
    IF WA_BILLING-FKTYP = 'A'.
      LV_TOTAL_INVOICES = LV_TOTAL_INVOICES + 1.
    ELSEIF WA_BILLING-FKTYP = 'B'.
      LV_TOTAL_CREDIT_MEMOS = LV_TOTAL_CREDIT_MEMOS + 1.
    ENDIF.

    LV_TOTAL_NET_VALUE = LV_TOTAL_NET_VALUE + WA_BILLING-NETWR.
    LV_TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT = LV_TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT + WA_BILLING-MWSBK.
    LV_TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE = LV_TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE + WA_BILLING-BRUTTO.

    IF WA_BILLING-OVERDUE_DAYS > 0.
      LV_OVERDUE_DOCUMENTS = LV_OVERDUE_DOCUMENTS + 1.
      LV_OVERDUE_AMOUNT = LV_OVERDUE_AMOUNT + WA_BILLING-BRUTTO.
      LV_AVG_DAYS_OVERDUE = LV_AVG_DAYS_OVERDUE + WA_BILLING-OVERDUE_DAYS.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  IF LV_OVERDUE_DOCUMENTS > 0.
    LV_AVG_DAYS_OVERDUE = LV_AVG_DAYS_OVERDUE / LV_OVERDUE_DOCUMENTS.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_OVERVIEW.
  WRITE: / '=== Billing Overview ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Total Documents:', LV_TOTAL_DOCUMENTS,
         'Invoices:', LV_TOTAL_INVOICES,
         'Credit Memos:', LV_TOTAL_CREDIT_MEMOS.
  WRITE: / 'Total Net Value:', LV_TOTAL_NET_VALUE CURRENCY WA_BILLING-WAERK,
         'Tax:', LV_TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT CURRENCY WA_BILLING-WAERK,
         'Gross:', LV_TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE CURRENCY WA_BILLING-WAERK.
  WRITE: / 'Overdue Documents:', LV_OVERDUE_DOCUMENTS,
         'Overdue Amount:', LV_OVERDUE_AMOUNT CURRENCY WA_BILLING-WAERK,
         'Avg Days Overdue:', LV_AVG_DAYS_OVERDUE.
  ULINE.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_CUSTOMER_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Customer Billing Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Customer', 'Name', 'Invoices', 'Credit Memos',
           'Net Value', 'Tax', 'Gross', 'Avg Value'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT CUST_BILL_TAB INTO WA_CUST_BILL.
    WRITE: / WA_CUST_BILL-KUNAG, WA_CUST_BILL-NAME1(15),
             WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_INVOICES,
             WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_CREDIT_MEMOS,
             WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_NET_VALUE CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_CUST_BILL-TOTAL_GROSS_VALUE CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_CUST_BILL-AVG_INVOICE_VALUE CURRENCY 'USD'.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_AGING_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Billing Aging Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Age Bucket', 'Documents', 'Amount', 'Percentage'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT AGING_TAB INTO WA_AGING.
    WRITE: / WA_AGING-BUCKET_TEXT,
             WA_AGING-DOCUMENT_COUNT,
             WA_AGING-TOTAL_AMOUNT CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_AGING-PERCENTAGE, '%'.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_MATERIAL_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Material Billing Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Rank', 'Material', 'Description', 'Quantity',
           'Total Value', 'Average Price'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT MAT_BILL_TAB INTO WA_MAT_BILL UP TO 10 ROWS.
    WRITE: / WA_MAT_BILL-REVENUE_RANK,
             WA_MAT_BILL-MATNR,
             WA_MAT_BILL-MAKTX(15),
             WA_MAT_BILL-TOTAL_BILLED_QTY,
             WA_MAT_BILL-TOTAL_BILLED_VALUE CURRENCY 'USD',
             WA_MAT_BILL-AVG_PRICE CURRENCY 'USD'.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_OVERDUE_DOCUMENTS.
  WRITE: / '=== Overdue Documents ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Document', 'Customer', 'Date', 'Due Date',
           'Days Overdue', 'Amount', 'Status'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT BILLING_TAB INTO WA_BILLING WHERE OVERDUE_DAYS > 0.
    WRITE: / WA_BILLING-VBELN, WA_BILLING-KUNAG,
             WA_BILLING-ERDAT, WA_BILLING-FBUDA,
             WA_BILLING-OVERDUE_DAYS,
             WA_BILLING-BRUTTO CURRENCY WA_BILLING-WAERK,
             WA_BILLING-STATUS_TEXT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_DETAILED_BILLING_LIST.
  WRITE: / '=== Detailed Billing List ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Document', 'Item', 'Material', 'Description',
           'Quantity', 'Price', 'Line Value', 'Tax'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT BILLING_TAB INTO WA_BILLING.
    WRITE: / WA_BILLING-VBELN, WA_BILLING-POSNR,
             WA_BILLING-MATNR, WA_BILLING-MAKTX(15),
             WA_BILLING-FKIMG, WA_BILLING-NETPR,
             WA_BILLING-LINE_VALUE CURRENCY WA_BILLING-WAERK,
             WA_BILLING-TAX_AMOUNT CURRENCY WA_BILLING-WAERK.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM EXPORT_BILLING_DATA.
  DATA: LV_FILENAME TYPE STRING.

  LV_FILENAME = 'BILLING_' && SY-DATUM && '.csv'.

  CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      FILENAME = LV_FILENAME
      FILETYPE = 'ASC'
    TABLES
      DATA_TAB = BILLING_TAB
    EXCEPTIONS
      OTHERS = 1.

  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    MESSAGE 'Billing data exported successfully' TYPE 'S'.
  ELSE.
    MESSAGE 'Export failed' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

AT LINE-SELECTION.
  PERFORM DRILLDOWN_BILLING_DETAILS.

FORM DRILLDOWN_BILLING_DETAILS.
  READ TABLE BILLING_TAB INTO WA_BILLING INDEX SY-LISEL.
  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    SET PARAMETER ID 'VF' FIELD WA_BILLING-VBELN.
    CALL TRANSACTION 'VF03' AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

output.program_summary: This billing document monitoring report provides comprehensive analysis of billing documents including invoices and credit memos, with detailed customer, aging, and material analysis. It is designed for finance managers and accounts receivable teams to track billing performance, identify overdue accounts, and manage revenue streams effectively.
output.logical_flow:
1. User selects billing documents by document number, customer, material, company code, billing date, document type, and accounting status.
2. Billing header data is fetched from VBRK with customer name from KNA1.
3. Billing item data is retrieved from VBRP with material descriptions from MARA.
4. Document status is determined from RFBSK: Approved, Blocked, Cleared, Not Yet Due, etc.
5. Overdue days are calculated based on FBUDA (base date) vs current date.
6. Dunning levels are assigned based on overdue days (1, 2, 3).
7. Customer billing analysis aggregates invoices, credit memos, and amounts by customer.
8. Aging analysis categorizes documents by age buckets: Current, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days.
9. Material billing analysis ranks materials by revenue contribution.
10. Multiple view options: Overview, Customer, Aging, Material, Overdue.
11. Detailed view displays line-level billing items.
12. Export functionality allows data extraction for external reporting.
13. Double-click navigates to transaction VF03 for billing document display.
key_data_structures: BILLING_STRUCTURE: Comprehensive billing document data with header, item, and calculated fields.
BILLING_TAB: Main internal table storing all billing documents and items.
CUSTOMER_BILLING_SUMMARY: Customer-level billing aggregation with financial metrics.
CUST_BILL_TAB: Internal table for customer billing analysis.
BILLING_AGING: Age-based billing analysis structure.
AGING_TAB: Internal table for billing aging analysis.
MATERIAL_BILLING_ANALYSIS: Material-level billing analysis with ranking.
MAT_BILL_TAB: Internal table for material revenue analysis.
output.technical_notes: The program uses VBRK for billing header and VBRP for items with RFBSK for accounting status. FKTYP differentiates between invoices ('A') and credit memos ('B'). Aging is based on FBUDA (base date for due date calculation). Dunning levels are assigned based on overdue thresholds. Material ranking uses SY-TABIX to assign revenue ranks. The COLLECT statement aggregates data at customer, aging, and material levels.

input:
REPORT Z_SHIPMENT_TRACKING_AND_LOGISTICS.

TABLES: LIKP, LIPS, VBAK, VBAP, KNA1, T001, T001W, ADRC, VTRK, VTTK.

DATA: BEGIN OF SHIPMENT_STRUCTURE,
        VBELN LIKE LIKP-VBELN,
        VBTYP LIKE LIKP-VBTYP,
        WERKS LIKE LIKP-WERKS,
        VSTEL LIKE LIKP-VSTEL,
        KUNNR LIKE LIKP-KUNNR,
        NAME1 LIKE KNA1-NAME1,
        BUKRS LIKE LIKP-BUKRS,
        WADAT LIKE LIKP-WADAT,
        WADAT_IST LIKE LIKP-WADAT_IST,
        LFART LIKE LIKP-LFART,
        LFDAT LIKE LIKP-LFDAT,
        LGDAT LIKE LIKP-LGDAT,
        TDDAT LIKE LIKP-TDDAT,
        LIFNR LIKE LIKP-LIFNR,
        XABLN LIKE LIKP-XABLN,
        TRATY LIKE LIKP-TRATY,
        VSART LIKE LIKP-VSART,
        STATUS LIKE LIKP-STATUS,
        STATUS_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        POSNR LIKE LIPS-POSNR,
        MATNR LIKE LIPS-MATNR,
        MAKTX LIKE MARA-MAKTX,
        LFIMG LIKE LIPS-LFIMG,
        VRKME LIKE LIPS-VRKME,
        MEINS LIKE LIPS-MEINS,
        NTGEW LIKE LIPS-NTGEW,
        BRGEW LIKE LIPS-BRGEW,
        GEWEI LIKE LIPS-GEWEI,
        VOLUM LIKE LIPS-VOLUM,
        VOLEH LIKE LIPS-VOLEH,
        VBELN_VL LIKE LIPS-VBELN_VL,
        POSNR_VL LIKE LIPS-POSNR_VL,
        SHIPMENT_NUMBER LIKE VTTK-TKNUM,
        SHIPMENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
        DELIVERY_PRIORITY TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        PRIORITY_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        DELAY_DAYS TYPE I,
        ROUTE_TEXT TYPE CHAR30,
        TRANSPORT_MODE TYPE CHAR20,
      END OF SHIPMENT_STRUCTURE.

DATA: SHIPMENT_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF SHIPMENT_STRUCTURE,
      WA_SHIPMENT LIKE SHIPMENT_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF DELIVERY_STATUS_SUMMARY,
        STATUS TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        STATUS_TEXT TYPE CHAR20,
        DELIVERY_COUNT TYPE I,
        TOTAL_WEIGHT TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        TOTAL_VOLUME TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        AVG_DELAY_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        PERCENTAGE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF DELIVERY_STATUS_SUMMARY.

DATA: STATUS_SUM_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF DELIVERY_STATUS_SUMMARY,
      WA_STATUS_SUM LIKE DELIVERY_STATUS_SUMMARY.

DATA: BEGIN OF CUSTOMER_SHIPMENT_ANALYSIS,
        KUNNR LIKE LIKP-KUNNR,
        NAME1 LIKE KNA1-NAME1,
        TOTAL_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
        COMPLETED_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
        PENDING_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
        TOTAL_WEIGHT TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        AVG_DELIVERY_TIME TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        ON_TIME_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        URGENT_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
      END OF CUSTOMER_SHIPMENT_ANALYSIS.

DATA: CUST_SHIP_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF CUSTOMER_SHIPMENT_ANALYSIS,
      WA_CUST_SHIP LIKE CUSTOMER_SHIPMENT_ANALYSIS.

DATA: BEGIN OF ROUTE_ANALYSIS,
        ROUTE TYPE CHAR10,
        ROUTE_DESC TYPE CHAR30,
        DELIVERY_COUNT TYPE I,
        ON_TIME_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
        LATE_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
        ON_TIME_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        AVG_WEIGHT TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
      END OF ROUTE_ANALYSIS.

DATA: ROUTE_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ROUTE_ANALYSIS,
      WA_ROUTE LIKE ROUTE_ANALYSIS.

DATA: BEGIN OF DAILY_SHIPMENT_VOLUME,
        SHIPMENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
        TOTAL_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
        TOTAL_WEIGHT TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        TOTAL_VOLUME TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        URGENT_COUNT TYPE I,
        DELAYED_COUNT TYPE I,
      END OF DAILY_SHIPMENT_VOLUME.

DATA: DAILY_VOLUME_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF DAILY_SHIPMENT_VOLUME,
      WA_DAILY_VOLUME LIKE DAILY_SHIPMENT_VOLUME.

DATA: LV_TOTAL_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
      LV_COMPLETED_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
      LV_PENDING_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
      LV_TOTAL_WEIGHT TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
      LV_TOTAL_VOLUME TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
      LV_AVG_DELIVERY_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_ON_TIME_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_URGENT_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
      LV_LATE_DELIVERIES TYPE I,
      LV_CURRENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_START_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_END_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_COMPANY_NAME TYPE T001-BUTXT.

SELECT-OPTIONS: S_VBELN FOR LIKP-VBELN,
                S_KUNNR FOR LIKP-KUNNR,
                S_MATNR FOR LIPS-MATNR,
                S_WERKS FOR LIKP-WERKS DEFAULT '1000',
                S_WADAT FOR LIKP-WADAT DEFAULT SY-DATUM,
                S_LFART FOR LIKP-LFART,
                S_STATUS FOR LIKP-STATUS.

PARAMETERS: P_OVERVIEW RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA DEFAULT 'X',
            P_CUSTOMER RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_ROUTE RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_DAILY RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_DELAYED RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_URGENT AS CHECKBOX,
            P_COMPLETED AS CHECKBOX,
            P_PENDING AS CHECKBOX,
            P_TRACKING AS CHECKBOX,
            P_EXPORT AS CHECKBOX.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  LV_CURRENT_DATE = SY-DATUM.
  LV_START_DATE = S_WADAT-LOW.
  LV_END_DATE = S_WADAT-HIGH.

  PERFORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  PERFORM FETCH_SHIPMENT_DATA.
  PERFORM FETCH_ITEM_DATA.
  PERFORM FETCH_SHIPMENT_DETAILS.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_SHIPMENT_METRICS.
  PERFORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  PERFORM GENERATE_SHIPMENT_REPORT.

TOP-OF-PAGE.
  WRITE: / 'Shipment Tracking & Logistics Report',
         / 'Company:', LV_COMPANY_NAME,
         / 'Period:', LV_START_DATE, 'to', LV_END_DATE,
         / 'Generated:', SY-DATUM, 'Time:', SY-UZEIT.
  ULINE.

FORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  SELECT SINGLE BUTXT FROM T001 INTO LV_COMPANY_NAME
    WHERE BUKRS = S_WERKS-LOW.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_SHIPMENT_DATA.
  SELECT A~VBELN A~VBTYP A~WERKS A~VSTEL A~KUNNR A~BUKRS
         A~WADAT A~WADAT_IST A~LFART A~LFDAT A~LGDAT A~TDDAT
         A~LIFNR A~XABLN A~TRATY A~VSART A~STATUS
         B~NAME1
    FROM LIKP AS A
    INNER JOIN KNA1 AS B ON A~KUNNR = B~KUNNR
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE SHIPMENT_TAB
    WHERE A~VBELN IN S_VBELN
      AND A~KUNNR IN S_KUNNR
      AND A~WERKS IN S_WERKS
      AND A~WADAT IN S_WADAT
      AND A~LFART IN S_LFART
      AND A~STATUS IN S_STATUS.

  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'No shipments found for the selection' TYPE 'W'.
    STOP.
  ENDIF.

  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT.
    CASE WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS.
      WHEN 'A'. WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Delivery Created'.
      WHEN 'B'. WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Picked'.
      WHEN 'C'. WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Goods Issued'.
      WHEN 'D'. WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Delivered'.
      WHEN 'E'. WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Completed'.
      WHEN 'F'. WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Blocked'.
      WHEN OTHERS. WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS_TEXT = 'Unknown'.
    ENDCASE.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS = 'A' OR WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS = 'B'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-DELIVERY_PRIORITY = 'H'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-PRIORITY_TEXT = 'High'.
    ELSEIF WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS = 'C'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-DELIVERY_PRIORITY = 'M'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-PRIORITY_TEXT = 'Medium'.
    ELSE.
      WA_SHIPMENT-DELIVERY_PRIORITY = 'L'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-PRIORITY_TEXT = 'Low'.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-WADAT_IST > WA_SHIPMENT-WADAT.
      WA_SHIPMENT-DELAY_DAYS = WA_SHIPMENT-WADAT_IST - WA_SHIPMENT-WADAT.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY SHIPMENT_TAB FROM WA_SHIPMENT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_ITEM_DATA.
  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT.
    SELECT A~POSNR A~MATNR A~LFIMG A~VRKME A~MEINS
           A~NTGEW A~BRGEW A~GEWEI A~VOLUM A~VOLEH
           A~VBELN_VL A~POSNR_VL
           B~MAKTX
      FROM LIPS AS A
      INNER JOIN MARA AS B ON A~MATNR = B~MATNR
      INTO TABLE @DATA(ITEM_TAB)
      WHERE A~VBELN = WA_SHIPMENT-VBELN.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      LOOP AT ITEM_TAB INTO DATA(WA_ITEM).
        WA_SHIPMENT-POSNR = WA_ITEM-POSNR.
        WA_SHIPMENT-MATNR = WA_ITEM-MATNR.
        WA_SHIPMENT-MAKTX = WA_ITEM-MAKTX.
        WA_SHIPMENT-LFIMG = WA_ITEM-LFIMG.
        WA_SHIPMENT-VRKME = WA_ITEM-VRKME.
        WA_SHIPMENT-MEINS = WA_ITEM-MEINS.
        WA_SHIPMENT-NTGEW = WA_ITEM-NTGEW.
        WA_SHIPMENT-BRGEW = WA_ITEM-BRGEW.
        WA_SHIPMENT-GEWEI = WA_ITEM-GEWEI.
        WA_SHIPMENT-VOLUM = WA_ITEM-VOLUM.
        WA_SHIPMENT-VOLEH = WA_ITEM-VOLEH.
        WA_SHIPMENT-VBELN_VL = WA_ITEM-VBELN_VL.
        WA_SHIPMENT-POSNR_VL = WA_ITEM-POSNR_VL.

        APPEND WA_SHIPMENT TO SHIPMENT_TAB.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_SHIPMENT_DETAILS.
  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT.
    SELECT SINGLE TKNUM
      FROM VTTK
      INTO WA_SHIPMENT-SHIPMENT_NUMBER
      WHERE VBELN = WA_SHIPMENT-VBELN.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_SHIPMENT-SHIPMENT_DATE = LV_CURRENT_DATE.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT SINGLE ROUTE
      FROM VTRK
      INTO @DATA(WA_VTRK)
      WHERE TKNUM = WA_SHIPMENT-SHIPMENT_NUMBER.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_SHIPMENT-ROUTE_TEXT = WA_VTRK-ROUTE.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY SHIPMENT_TAB FROM WA_SHIPMENT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_SHIPMENT_METRICS.
  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT.
    IF WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS = 'D' OR WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS = 'E'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-DELIVERY_PRIORITY = 'C'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-PRIORITY_TEXT = 'Completed'.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-TRATY = '001'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-TRANSPORT_MODE = 'Truck'.
    ELSEIF WA_SHIPMENT-TRATY = '002'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-TRANSPORT_MODE = 'Rail'.
    ELSEIF WA_SHIPMENT-TRATY = '003'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-TRANSPORT_MODE = 'Air'.
    ELSEIF WA_SHIPMENT-TRATY = '004'.
      WA_SHIPMENT-TRANSPORT_MODE = 'Ship'.
    ELSE.
      WA_SHIPMENT-TRANSPORT_MODE = 'Unknown'.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY SHIPMENT_TAB FROM WA_SHIPMENT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X' OR P_STATUS = 'X'.
    PERFORM STATUS_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X' OR P_CUSTOMER = 'X'.
    PERFORM CUSTOMER_SHIPMENT_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X' OR P_ROUTE = 'X'.
    PERFORM ROUTE_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X' OR P_DAILY = 'X'.
    PERFORM DAILY_VOLUME_ANALYSIS.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM STATUS_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT.
    WA_STATUS_SUM-STATUS = WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS.
    WA_STATUS_SUM-STATUS_TEXT = WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS_TEXT.
    WA_STATUS_SUM-DELIVERY_COUNT = WA_STATUS_SUM-DELIVERY_COUNT + 1.
    WA_STATUS_SUM-TOTAL_WEIGHT = WA_STATUS_SUM-TOTAL_WEIGHT + WA_SHIPMENT-BRGEW.
    WA_STATUS_SUM-TOTAL_VOLUME = WA_STATUS_SUM-TOTAL_VOLUME + WA_SHIPMENT-VOLUM.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-DELAY_DAYS > 0.
      WA_STATUS_SUM-AVG_DELAY_DAYS = WA_STATUS_SUM-AVG_DELAY_DAYS + WA_SHIPMENT-DELAY_DAYS.
    ENDIF.

    COLLECT WA_STATUS_SUM INTO STATUS_SUM_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_STATUS_SUM.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT STATUS_SUM_TAB INTO WA_STATUS_SUM.
    IF WA_STATUS_SUM-DELIVERY_COUNT > 0.
      WA_STATUS_SUM-AVG_DELAY_DAYS = WA_STATUS_SUM-AVG_DELAY_DAYS / WA_STATUS_SUM-DELIVERY_COUNT.
    ENDIF.

    IF LV_TOTAL_DELIVERIES > 0.
      WA_STATUS_SUM-PERCENTAGE = ( WA_STATUS_SUM-DELIVERY_COUNT / LV_TOTAL_DELIVERIES ) * 100.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY STATUS_SUM_TAB FROM WA_STATUS_SUM.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM CUSTOMER_SHIPMENT_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT.
    WA_CUST_SHIP-KUNNR = WA_SHIPMENT-KUNNR.
    WA_CUST_SHIP-NAME1 = WA_SHIPMENT-NAME1.
    WA_CUST_SHIP-TOTAL_DELIVERIES = WA_CUST_SHIP-TOTAL_DELIVERIES + 1.
    WA_CUST_SHIP-TOTAL_WEIGHT = WA_CUST_SHIP-TOTAL_WEIGHT + WA_SHIPMENT-BRGEW.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS = 'D' OR WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS = 'E'.
      WA_CUST_SHIP-COMPLETED_DELIVERIES = WA_CUST_SHIP-COMPLETED_DELIVERIES + 1.
    ELSE.
      WA_CUST_SHIP-PENDING_DELIVERIES = WA_CUST_SHIP-PENDING_DELIVERIES + 1.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-DELIVERY_PRIORITY = 'H'.
      WA_CUST_SHIP-URGENT_DELIVERIES = WA_CUST_SHIP-URGENT_DELIVERIES + 1.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-DELAY_DAYS = 0.
      WA_CUST_SHIP-ON_TIME_RATE = WA_CUST_SHIP-ON_TIME_RATE + 1.
    ENDIF.

    COLLECT WA_CUST_SHIP INTO CUST_SHIP_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_CUST_SHIP.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT CUST_SHIP_TAB INTO WA_CUST_SHIP.
    IF WA_CUST_SHIP-TOTAL_DELIVERIES > 0.
      WA_CUST_SHIP-ON_TIME_RATE = ( WA_CUST_SHIP-ON_TIME_RATE / WA_CUST_SHIP-TOTAL_DELIVERIES ) * 100.
    ENDIF.
    MODIFY CUST_SHIP_TAB FROM WA_CUST_SHIP.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT CUST_SHIP_TAB BY TOTAL_DELIVERIES DESCENDING.
ENDFORM.

FORM ROUTE_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT.
    WA_ROUTE-ROUTE = WA_SHIPMENT-ROUTE_TEXT.
    WA_ROUTE-DELIVERY_COUNT = WA_ROUTE-DELIVERY_COUNT + 1.
    WA_ROUTE-AVG_WEIGHT = WA_ROUTE-AVG_WEIGHT + WA_SHIPMENT-BRGEW.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-DELAY_DAYS = 0.
      WA_ROUTE-ON_TIME_DELIVERIES = WA_ROUTE-ON_TIME_DELIVERIES + 1.
    ELSE.
      WA_ROUTE-LATE_DELIVERIES = WA_ROUTE-LATE_DELIVERIES + 1.
    ENDIF.

    COLLECT WA_ROUTE INTO ROUTE_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_ROUTE.
  ENDLOOP.

  LOOP AT ROUTE_TAB INTO WA_ROUTE.
    IF WA_ROUTE-DELIVERY_COUNT > 0.
      WA_ROUTE-ON_TIME_RATE = ( WA_ROUTE-ON_TIME_DELIVERIES / WA_ROUTE-DELIVERY_COUNT ) * 100.
      WA_ROUTE-AVG_WEIGHT = WA_ROUTE-AVG_WEIGHT / WA_ROUTE-DELIVERY_COUNT.
      MODIFY ROUTE_TAB FROM WA_ROUTE.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT ROUTE_TAB BY ON_TIME_RATE DESCENDING.
ENDFORM.

FORM DAILY_VOLUME_ANALYSIS.
  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT.
    WA_DAILY_VOLUME-SHIPMENT_DATE = WA_SHIPMENT-WADAT.
    WA_DAILY_VOLUME-TOTAL_DELIVERIES = WA_DAILY_VOLUME-TOTAL_DELIVERIES + 1.
    WA_DAILY_VOLUME-TOTAL_WEIGHT = WA_DAILY_VOLUME-TOTAL_WEIGHT + WA_SHIPMENT-BRGEW.
    WA_DAILY_VOLUME-TOTAL_VOLUME = WA_DAILY_VOLUME-TOTAL_VOLUME + WA_SHIPMENT-VOLUM.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-DELIVERY_PRIORITY = 'H'.
      WA_DAILY_VOLUME-URGENT_COUNT = WA_DAILY_VOLUME-URGENT_COUNT + 1.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-DELAY_DAYS > 0.
      WA_DAILY_VOLUME-DELAYED_COUNT = WA_DAILY_VOLUME-DELAYED_COUNT + 1.
    ENDIF.

    COLLECT WA_DAILY_VOLUME INTO DAILY_VOLUME_TAB.
    CLEAR WA_DAILY_VOLUME.
  ENDLOOP.

  SORT DAILY_VOLUME_TAB BY SHIPMENT_DATE ASCENDING.
ENDFORM.

FORM GENERATE_SHIPMENT_REPORT.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_GLOBAL_STATISTICS.

  IF P_OVERVIEW = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_OVERVIEW.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_STATUS_ANALYSIS.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_DAILY_VOLUME.
  ELSEIF P_CUSTOMER = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_CUSTOMER_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_ROUTE = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_ROUTE_ANALYSIS.
  ELSEIF P_DAILY = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_DAILY_VOLUME.
  ELSEIF P_DELAYED = 'X'.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_DELAYED_SHIPMENTS.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_TRACKING = 'X'.
    SKIP 2.
    PERFORM DISPLAY_TRACKING_INFORMATION.
  ENDIF.

  IF P_EXPORT = 'X'.
    PERFORM EXPORT_SHIPMENT_DATA.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_GLOBAL_STATISTICS.
  LV_TOTAL_DELIVERIES = LINES( SHIPMENT_TAB ).
  LV_COMPLETED_DELIVERIES = 0.
  LV_PENDING_DELIVERIES = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_WEIGHT = 0.
  LV_TOTAL_VOLUME = 0.
  LV_URGENT_DELIVERIES = 0.
  LV_LATE_DELIVERIES = 0.

  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT.
    LV_TOTAL_WEIGHT = LV_TOTAL_WEIGHT + WA_SHIPMENT-BRGEW.
    LV_TOTAL_VOLUME = LV_TOTAL_VOLUME + WA_SHIPMENT-VOLUM.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS = 'D' OR WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS = 'E'.
      LV_COMPLETED_DELIVERIES = LV_COMPLETED_DELIVERIES + 1.
    ELSE.
      LV_PENDING_DELIVERIES = LV_PENDING_DELIVERIES + 1.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-DELIVERY_PRIORITY = 'H'.
      LV_URGENT_DELIVERIES = LV_URGENT_DELIVERIES + 1.
    ENDIF.

    IF WA_SHIPMENT-DELAY_DAYS > 0.
      LV_LATE_DELIVERIES = LV_LATE_DELIVERIES + 1.
      LV_AVG_DELIVERY_DAYS = LV_AVG_DELIVERY_DAYS + WA_SHIPMENT-DELAY_DAYS.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

  IF LV_TOTAL_DELIVERIES > 0.
    LV_ON_TIME_RATE = ( ( LV_TOTAL_DELIVERIES - LV_LATE_DELIVERIES ) / LV_TOTAL_DELIVERIES ) * 100.
  ENDIF.

  IF LV_LATE_DELIVERIES > 0.
    LV_AVG_DELIVERY_DAYS = LV_AVG_DELIVERY_DAYS / LV_LATE_DELIVERIES.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_OVERVIEW.
  WRITE: / '=== Shipment Logistics Overview ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Total Deliveries:', LV_TOTAL_DELIVERIES,
         'Completed:', LV_COMPLETED_DELIVERIES,
         'Pending:', LV_PENDING_DELIVERIES.
  WRITE: / 'Total Weight:', LV_TOTAL_WEIGHT, 'KG',
         'Total Volume:', LV_TOTAL_VOLUME, 'CBM'.
  WRITE: / 'Urgent Deliveries:', LV_URGENT_DELIVERIES,
         'Late Deliveries:', LV_LATE_DELIVERIES,
         'On-Time Rate:', LV_ON_TIME_RATE, '%'.
  ULINE.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_STATUS_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Delivery Status Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Status', 'Count', 'Weight', 'Volume', 'Avg Delay', '%'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT STATUS_SUM_TAB INTO WA_STATUS_SUM.
    WRITE: / WA_STATUS_SUM-STATUS_TEXT(15),
             WA_STATUS_SUM-DELIVERY_COUNT,
             WA_STATUS_SUM-TOTAL_WEIGHT,
             WA_STATUS_SUM-TOTAL_VOLUME,
             WA_STATUS_SUM-AVG_DELAY_DAYS,
             WA_STATUS_SUM-PERCENTAGE, '%'.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_CUSTOMER_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Customer Shipment Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Customer', 'Name', 'Total', 'Completed',
           'Pending', 'Weight', 'On-Time %', 'Urgent'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT CUST_SHIP_TAB INTO WA_CUST_SHIP.
    WRITE: / WA_CUST_SHIP-KUNNR, WA_CUST_SHIP-NAME1(15),
             WA_CUST_SHIP-TOTAL_DELIVERIES,
             WA_CUST_SHIP-COMPLETED_DELIVERIES,
             WA_CUST_SHIP-PENDING_DELIVERIES,
             WA_CUST_SHIP-TOTAL_WEIGHT,
             WA_CUST_SHIP-ON_TIME_RATE,
             WA_CUST_SHIP-URGENT_DELIVERIES.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_ROUTE_ANALYSIS.
  WRITE: / '=== Route Performance Analysis ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Route', 'Deliveries', 'On-Time', 'Late', 'On-Time %', 'Avg Weight'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT ROUTE_TAB INTO WA_ROUTE.
    WRITE: / WA_ROUTE-ROUTE(15),
             WA_ROUTE-DELIVERY_COUNT,
             WA_ROUTE-ON_TIME_DELIVERIES,
             WA_ROUTE-LATE_DELIVERIES,
             WA_ROUTE-ON_TIME_RATE,
             WA_ROUTE-AVG_WEIGHT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_DAILY_VOLUME.
  WRITE: / '=== Daily Shipment Volume ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Date', 'Deliveries', 'Weight', 'Volume', 'Urgent', 'Delayed'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT DAILY_VOLUME_TAB INTO WA_DAILY_VOLUME.
    WRITE: / WA_DAILY_VOLUME-SHIPMENT_DATE,
             WA_DAILY_VOLUME-TOTAL_DELIVERIES,
             WA_DAILY_VOLUME-TOTAL_WEIGHT,
             WA_DAILY_VOLUME-TOTAL_VOLUME,
             WA_DAILY_VOLUME-URGENT_COUNT,
             WA_DAILY_VOLUME-DELAYED_COUNT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_DELAYED_SHIPMENTS.
  WRITE: / '=== Delayed Shipments ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Delivery', 'Customer', 'Planned', 'Actual', 'Delay', 'Status'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT WHERE DELAY_DAYS > 0.
    WRITE: / WA_SHIPMENT-VBELN, WA_SHIPMENT-KUNNR,
             WA_SHIPMENT-WADAT, WA_SHIPMENT-WADAT_IST,
             WA_SHIPMENT-DELAY_DAYS, WA_SHIPMENT-STATUS_TEXT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM DISPLAY_TRACKING_INFORMATION.
  WRITE: / '=== Shipment Tracking Information ==='.
  WRITE: / 'Delivery', 'Shipment No', 'Date', 'Route', 'Mode', 'Priority'.
  ULINE.

  LOOP AT SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT.
    WRITE: / WA_SHIPMENT-VBELN,
             WA_SHIPMENT-SHIPMENT_NUMBER,
             WA_SHIPMENT-SHIPMENT_DATE,
             WA_SHIPMENT-ROUTE_TEXT(15),
             WA_SHIPMENT-TRANSPORT_MODE(10),
             WA_SHIPMENT-PRIORITY_TEXT.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM EXPORT_SHIPMENT_DATA.
  DATA: LV_FILENAME TYPE STRING.

  LV_FILENAME = 'SHIPMENT_' && SY-DATUM && '.csv'.

  CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      FILENAME = LV_FILENAME
      FILETYPE = 'ASC'
    TABLES
      DATA_TAB = SHIPMENT_TAB
    EXCEPTIONS
      OTHERS = 1.

  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    MESSAGE 'Shipment data exported successfully' TYPE 'S'.
  ELSE.
    MESSAGE 'Export failed' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

AT LINE-SELECTION.
  PERFORM DRILLDOWN_SHIPMENT_DETAILS.

FORM DRILLDOWN_SHIPMENT_DETAILS.
  READ TABLE SHIPMENT_TAB INTO WA_SHIPMENT INDEX SY-LISEL.
  IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
    SET PARAMETER ID 'VL' FIELD WA_SHIPMENT-VBELN.
    CALL TRANSACTION 'VL03' AND SKIP FIRST SCREEN.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

output.program_summary: This shipment tracking and logistics report provides end-to-end visibility into delivery operations, including shipment status, route performance, customer analysis, and daily volume tracking. It is designed for logistics managers and supply chain teams to monitor delivery performance, identify bottlenecks, and optimize shipping operations.
output.logical_flow:
1. User selects shipments by delivery document, customer, material, plant, goods issue date, delivery type, and status.
2. Delivery header data is fetched from LIKP with customer name from KNA1.
3. Delivery item data is retrieved from LIPS with material descriptions from MARA.
4. Shipment details (shipment number, route) are fetched from VTTK and VTRK.
5. Status mapping: A=Created, B=Picked, C=Goods Issued, D=Delivered, E=Completed, F=Blocked.
6. Delivery priority is assigned: High for created/picked, Medium for goods issued, Low for completed.
7. Delay days are calculated by comparing actual goods issue date with planned date.
8. Transport mode is determined from TRATY: Truck, Rail, Air, Ship.
9. Multiple analysis views: Overview, Customer, Route, Daily Volume, Delayed.
10. Status analysis shows distribution across delivery statuses with percentages.
11. Route performance analysis ranks routes by on-time delivery rate.
12. Daily volume tracking shows shipment trends over time.
13. Tracking information provides shipment-level visibility.
14. Double-click navigates to transaction VL03 for delivery document display.
key_data_structures: SHIPMENT_STRUCTURE: Comprehensive shipment data with header, item, and calculated fields.
SHIPMENT_TAB: Main internal table storing all shipments and items.
DELIVERY_STATUS_SUMMARY: Status-level aggregation with counts and metrics.
STATUS_SUM_TAB: Internal table for status analysis.
CUSTOMER_SHIPMENT_ANALYSIS: Customer-level shipment aggregation with on-time rates.
CUST_SHIP_TAB: Internal table for customer shipment analysis.
ROUTE_ANALYSIS: Route performance analysis with on-time metrics.
ROUTE_TAB: Internal table for route analysis.
DAILY_SHIPMENT_VOLUME: Daily shipment volume and performance structure.
DAILY_VOLUME_TAB: Internal table for daily volume tracking.
output.technical_notes: The program uses LIKP for delivery header and LIPS for items. VTTK and VTRK provide shipment-level details. Status determination uses LIKP-STATUS field. Delay calculation compares WADAT (planned goods issue date) with WADAT_IST (actual goods issue date). Route performance is based on delay days where zero means on-time. The COLLECT statement aggregates data at status, customer, route, and daily levels.

input:
REPORT Z_MATERIAL_REQUIREMENTS_PLANNING.

TABLES: MARA, MARC, MARD, MBEW, T001, T001W, EKKO, EKPO, RESB.

DATA: BEGIN OF MATERIAL_PLANNING_STRUCTURE,
        MATNR LIKE MARA-MATNR,
        MAKTX LIKE MARA-MAKTX,
        WERKS LIKE MARC-WERKS,
        MTART LIKE MARA-MTART,
        MEINS LIKE MARA-MEINS,
        DISPO LIKE MARC-DISPO,
        EKGRP LIKE MARC-EKGRP,
        BESKZ LIKE MARC-BESKZ,
        SOBSL LIKE MARC-SOBSL,
        PLIFZ LIKE MARC-PLIFZ,
        MABST LIKE MARC-MABST,
        MINBE LIKE MARC-MINBE,
        MAXBE LIKE MARC-MAXBE,
        BSTMI LIKE MARC-BSTMI,
        BSTMA LIKE MARC-BSTMA,
        EISBE LIKE MARC-EISBE,
        SAFETY_STOCK TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        REORDER_POINT TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        CURRENT_STOCK TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        RESERVED_STOCK TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        AVAILABLE_STOCK TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        OPEN_PO_QTY TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        OPEN_PO_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        PLANNED_ORDERS TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        PURCHASE_REQUISITIONS TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        DEMAND_FORECAST TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        COVERAGE_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        REORDER_REQUIRED AS FLAG,
        REORDER_QUANTITY TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        SUGGESTED_ORDER_TYPE TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        SUGGESTION_TEXT TYPE CHAR30,
        URGENCY_LEVEL TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        URGENCY_TEXT TYPE CHAR15,
      END OF MATERIAL_PLANNING_STRUCTURE.

DATA: PLAN_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF MATERIAL_PLANNING_STRUCTURE,
      WA_PLAN LIKE MATERIAL_PLANNING_STRUCTURE.

DATA: BEGIN OF MRP_ELEMENT_SUMMARY,
        MATNR LIKE MARA-MATNR,
        MAKTX LIKE MARA-MAKTX,
        TOTAL_REQUIREMENTS TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        TOTAL_RECEIPTS TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        NET_REQUIREMENTS TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        COVERAGE_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        REQUISITION_COUNT TYPE I,
        ORDER_COUNT TYPE I,
      END OF MRP_ELEMENT_SUMMARY.

DATA: MRP_SUM_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF MRP_ELEMENT_SUMMARY,
      WA_MRP_SUM LIKE MRP_ELEMENT_SUMMARY.

DATA: BEGIN OF MRP_EXCEPTION,
        MATNR LIKE MARA-MATNR,
        MAKTX LIKE MARA-MAKTX,
        EXCEPTION_TYPE TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        EXCEPTION_TEXT TYPE CHAR50,
        SEVERITY TYPE C LENGTH 1,
        ACTION_REQUIRED AS FLAG,
      END OF MRP_EXCEPTION.

DATA: EXCEPTION_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF MRP_EXCEPTION,
      WA_EXCEPTION LIKE MRP_EXCEPTION.

DATA: BEGIN OF SUPPLIER_PERFORMANCE,
        LIFNR LIKE EKKO-LIFNR,
        NAME1 LIKE LFA1-NAME1,
        TOTAL_ORDERS TYPE I,
        TOTAL_QTY TYPE P DECIMALS 3,
        TOTAL_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        AVG_LEAD_TIME TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        ON_TIME_DELIVERY_RATE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
        QUALITY_RATING TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      END OF SUPPLIER_PERFORMANCE.

DATA: SUPPLIER_TAB TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF SUPPLIER_PERFORMANCE,
      WA_SUPPLIER LIKE SUPPLIER_PERFORMANCE.

DATA: LV_TOTAL_MATERIALS TYPE I,
      LV_CRITICAL_MATERIALS TYPE I,
      LV_REORDER_MATERIALS TYPE I,
      LV_EXCESS_MATERIALS TYPE I,
      LV_TOTAL_STOCK_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_TOTAL_OPEN_PO_VALUE TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_AVG_COVERAGE_DAYS TYPE P DECIMALS 2,
      LV_CURRENT_DATE TYPE SY-DATUM,
      LV_PLANNING_HORIZON TYPE I VALUE 30,
      LV_COMPANY_NAME TYPE T001-BUTXT.

SELECT-OPTIONS: S_MATNR FOR MARA-MATNR,
                S_WERKS FOR MARC-WERKS DEFAULT '1000',
                S_MTART FOR MARA-MTART,
                S_DISPO FOR MARC-DISPO,
                S_EKGRP FOR MARC-EKGRP,
                S_BESKZ FOR MARC-BESKZ.

PARAMETERS: P_OVERVIEW RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA DEFAULT 'X',
            P_EXCEPTION RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_SUPPLIER RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_ORDER RADIOBUTTON GROUP STA,
            P_REORDER_TYPE RADIOBUTTON GROUP TYP DEFAULT 'M',
            P_SAFETY_DAYS TYPE I DEFAULT 15,
            P_REORDER_DAYS TYPE I DEFAULT 7,
            P_EXCESS_DAYS TYPE I DEFAULT 60,
            P_AUTO_CALCULATE AS CHECKBOX,
            P_GENERATE_REQS AS CHECKBOX,
            P_EXPORT AS CHECKBOX.

START-OF-SELECTION.
  LV_CURRENT_DATE = SY-DATUM.

  PERFORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  PERFORM FETCH_MATERIAL_MASTER.
  PERFORM FETCH_STOCK_DATA.
  PERFORM FETCH_OPEN_PURCHASE_ORDERS.
  PERFORM FETCH_DEMAND_DATA.
  PERFORM CALCULATE_MRP_METRICS.
  PERFORM IDENTIFY_EXCEPTIONS.
  PERFORM PERFORM_ANALYSIS.
  PERFORM GENERATE_MRP_REPORT.

TOP-OF-PAGE.
  WRITE: / 'Material Requirements Planning Report',
         / 'Company:', LV_COMPANY_NAME,
         / 'Plant:', S_WERKS-LOW,
         / 'Planning Horizon:', LV_PLANNING_HORIZON, 'Days',
         / 'Generated:', SY-DATUM, 'Time:', SY-UZEIT.
  ULINE.

FORM GET_COMPANY_INFO.
  SELECT SINGLE BUTXT FROM T001 INTO LV_COMPANY_NAME
    WHERE BUKRS = S_WERKS-LOW.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_MATERIAL_MASTER.
  SELECT A~MATNR A~MAKTX A~MTART A~MEINS
         B~WERKS B~DISPO B~EKGRP B~BESKZ B~SOBSL
         B~PLIFZ B~MABST B~MINBE B~MAXBE
         B~BSTMI B~BSTMA B~EISBE
    FROM MARA AS A
    INNER JOIN MARC AS B ON A~MATNR = B~MATNR
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE PLAN_TAB
    WHERE A~MATNR IN S_MATNR
      AND B~WERKS IN S_WERKS
      AND A~MTART IN S_MTART
      AND B~DISPO IN S_DISPO
      AND B~EKGRP IN S_EKGRP
      AND B~BESKZ IN S_BESKZ.

  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
    MESSAGE 'No materials found for the selection' TYPE 'W'.
    STOP.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_STOCK_DATA.
  LOOP AT PLAN_TAB INTO WA_PLAN.
    SELECT SINGLE LABST UMLME
      FROM MARD
      INTO @DATA(WA_MARD)
      WHERE MATNR = WA_PLAN-MATNR
        AND WERKS = WA_PLAN-WERKS.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_PLAN-CURRENT_STOCK = WA_MARD-LABST + WA_MARD-UMLME.
    ENDIF.

    SELECT SINGLE VERPR
      FROM MBEW
      INTO @DATA(WA_MBEW)
      WHERE MATNR = WA_PLAN-MATNR
        AND WERKS = WA_PLAN-WERKS.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_PLAN-OPEN_PO_VALUE = WA_PLAN-CURRENT_STOCK * WA_MBEW-VERPR.
      LV_TOTAL_STOCK_VALUE = LV_TOTAL_STOCK_VALUE + WA_PLAN-OPEN_PO_VALUE.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY PLAN_TAB FROM WA_PLAN.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_OPEN_PURCHASE_ORDERS.
  LOOP AT PLAN_TAB INTO WA_PLAN.
    SELECT SUM( MENGE ) AS OPEN_QTY
      FROM EKPO
      INTO @DATA(LV_OPEN_QTY)
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN EKKO
      WHERE MATNR = WA_PLAN-MATNR
        AND EKORG = WA_PLAN-WERKS
        AND EBELN = EKKO-EBELN
        AND EKKO-BSART = 'NB'.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_PLAN-OPEN_PO_QTY = LV_OPEN_QTY.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY PLAN_TAB FROM WA_PLAN.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM FETCH_DEMAND_DATA.
  LOOP AT PLAN_TAB INTO WA_PLAN.
    SELECT SUM( BDTER ) AS DEMAND
      FROM RESB
      INTO @DATA(LV_DEMAND)
      WHERE MATNR = WA_PLAN-MATNR
        AND WERKS = WA_PLAN-WERKS.

    IF SY-SUBRC = 0.
      WA_PLAN-DEMAND_FORECAST = LV_DEMAND.
    ENDIF.

    MODIFY PLAN_TAB FROM WA_PLAN.
  ENDLOOP.
ENDFORM.

FORM CALCULATE_MRP_METRICS.
  LOOP AT PLAN_TAB INTO WA_PLAN.
    WA_PLAN-SAFETY_STOCK = WA_PLAN-EISBE.
    WA_PLAN-REORDER_POINT = WA_PLAN-MINBE.

    WA_PLAN-AVAILABLE_STOCK = WA_PLAN-CURRENT_STOCK - WA_PLAN-RESERVED_STOCK + WA_PLAN-OPEN_PO_QTY.

    IF WA_PLAN-DEMAND_FORECAST > 0 AND WA_PLAN-AVAILABLE_STOCK > 0.
      WA_PLAN-COVERAGE_DAYS = WA_PLAN-AVAILABLE_STOCK / ( WA_PLAN-DEMAND_FORECAST / 30 ).
    ENDIF.
